## MODEL ✨

The plan to refactor the core logic in `src/sky_music/domain/analyzer.py` and `src/sky_music/domain/parser.py` is ready.

Please review the proposed plan:

# Refactor Core Logic

## Objective
Reduce code complexity and improve maintainability in `src/sky_music/domain/analyzer.py` and `src/sky_music/domain/parser.py`.

## Key Files & Context
- `src/sky_music/domain/analyzer.py`: Contains a large, complex `analyze_schedule` function.
- `src/sky_music/domain/parser.py`: Contains `parse_song_file` which mixes concerns.

## Implementation Steps

### 1. Refactor `analyzer.py`
- Break `analyze_schedule` into smaller functions:
    - `_find_dense_clusters(events)`
    - `_compute_min_gaps(events, raw_notes)`
    - `_evaluate_risk_severity(res, ...)`
    - `_build_recommendations(res, severity, ...)`
- Maintain the same external API for `analyze_schedule`.

### 2. Refactor `parser.py`
- Move `SKY_15_KEY_PROFILE` import to the top of the file.
- Potentially extract the note parsing logic into a helper function.

### 3. Verification & Testing
- Run existing tests to ensure no regressions: `pytest`.
- Add new unit tests if necessary to cover the extracted functions.

## Verification & Testing
- Run existing test suite after each major refactoring step.
- Confirm all tests pass.

---
Do you agree with this approach? If so, I will proceed to implement these changes.

{
  "name": "write_file",
  "args": {
    "content": "from dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import Any, Literal\nfrom sky_music.domain.scheduler_types import ScheduleResult\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)\nclass DenseCluster:\n    start_us: int\n    end_us: int\n    note_count: int\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)\nclass ScheduleRiskReport:\n    severity: Literal[\"low\", \"medium\", \"high\"]\n    impossible_repeats: int\n    impossible_same_key_repeats: int\n    compressed_holds: int\n    max_polyphony: int\n    min_any_note_gap_us: int | None\n    min_same_key_gap_us: int | None\n    dense_clusters: tuple[DenseCluster, ...]\n    recommendations: tuple[str, ...]\n    average_notes_per_second: float = 0.0\n    peak_notes_per_second_1s: float = 0.0\n    suggested_profile: str = \"balanced\"\n    suggested_tempo_scale: float = 1.0\n    reason: str = \"\"\n    max_chord_size: int = 0\n    chords_count: int = 0\n    timing_stress_rate: float = 0.0\n\ndef _find_dense_clusters(down_events: list[Any]) -> list[DenseCluster]:\n    \"\"\"Sliding Window O(n) scan to identify dense clusters (> 6 notes within any 100ms)\"\"\"\n    dense_clusters_list = []\n    left = 0\n    n = len(down_events)\n    for right in range(n):\n        while down_events[right].at_us - down_events[left].at_us > 100_000:\n            left += 1\n            \n        note_count = right - left + 1\n        if note_count > 6:\n            start_us = down_events[left].at_us\n            end_us = down_events[right].at_us\n            \n            # Coalesce/merge overlapping dense clusters to avoid duplicate warnings\n            if dense_clusters_list and start_us <= dense_clusters_list[-1].end_us + 50_000:\n                prev = dense_clusters_list[-1]\n                dense_clusters_list[-1] = DenseCluster(\n                    start_us=prev.start_us,\n                    end_us=end_us,\n                    note_count=max(prev.note_count, note_count)\n                )\n            else:\n                dense_clusters_list.append(DenseCluster(\n                    start_us=start_us,\n                    end_us=end_us,\n                    note_count=note_count\n                ))\n    return dense_clusters_list\n\ndef _compute_min_gaps(res: ScheduleResult, raw_notes: tuple[Any, ...] | None) -> tuple[int | None, int | None]:\n    \"\"\"Compute minimum gap between ANY two notes and SAME physical key.\"\"\"\n    down_events = sorted([action for action in res.actions if action.kind == \"down\"], key=lambda a: a.at_us)\n    n = len(down_events)\n    \n    # Post-scheduler fallback\n    min_any_note_gap_us = None\n    if n > 1:\n        min_any_note_gap_us = min(down_events[i].at_us - down_events[i-1].at_us for i in range(1, n))\n        \n    min_same_key_gap_us = None\n    key_last_down = {}\n    same_key_gaps = []\n    \n    for action in res.actions:\n        if action.kind == \"down\":\n            for sc in action.scan_codes:\n                if sc in key_last_down:\n                    same_key_gaps.append(action.at_us - key_last_down[sc])\n                key_last_down[sc] = action.at_us\n                \n    if same_key_gaps:\n        min_same_key_gap_us = min(same_key_gaps)\n\n    # Compute metrics from raw, un-deduplicated notes if provided\n    raw_min_any_note_gap_us = min_any_note_gap_us\n    raw_min_same_key_gap_us = min_same_key_gap_us\n    \n    if raw_notes:\n        sorted_notes = sorted(raw_notes, key=lambda note: note.time_ms)\n        onsets = sorted(list(set(note.time_ms for note in sorted_notes)))\n        if len(onsets) > 1:\n            raw_min_any_note_gap_us = min(onsets[i] - onsets[i-1] for i in range(1, len(onsets))) * 1000\n            \n        key_last_ms = {}\n        same_key_gaps_ms = []\n        for note in sorted_notes:\n            k = note.key\n            if k in key_last_ms:\n                same_key_gaps_ms.append(note.time_ms - key_last_ms[k])\n            key_last_ms[k] = note.time_ms\n        if same_key_gaps_ms:\n            raw_min_same_key_gap_us = min(same_key_gaps_ms) * 1000\n            \n    return raw_min_any_note_gap_us, raw_min_same_key_gap_us\n\ndef _evaluate_risk_severity(res: ScheduleResult, dense_clusters_list: list[DenseCluster]) -> tuple[Literal[\"low\", \"medium\", \"high\"], list[str], list[str]]:\n    severity: Literal[\"low\", \"medium\", \"high\"] = \"low\"\n    recommendations = []\n    reasons_list = []\n    \n    if res.impossible_same_key_repeats > 0:\n        severity = \"high\"\n        reasons_list.append(\"same-key repeats\")\n        recommendations.append(\n            f\"{res.impossible_same_key_repeats} repeated notes are too close for the current timing profile.\"\n        )\n        recommendations.append(\n            \"Some holds were shortened, which may cause dropped notes.\"\n        )\n        \n    if res.risky_same_key_repeats > 0:\n        if severity == \"low\":\n            severity = \"medium\"\n        reasons_list.append(\"risky repeats\")\n        recommendations.append(\n            f\"Detected {res.risky_same_key_repeats} risky same-key repeat(s) close to min hold.\"\n        )\n        \n    if res.shortest_same_key_interval_us is not None:\n        recommendations.append(\n            f\"Shortest same-key repeat interval: {res.shortest_same_key_interval_us / 1000.0:.1f}ms.\"\n        )\n        \n    dense_count = len(dense_clusters_list)\n    if dense_count > 5:\n        if severity != \"high\":\n            severity = \"high\" if dense_count > 15 else \"medium\"\n        reasons_list.append(\"dense clusters\")\n        recommendations.append(\n            f\"Detected {dense_count} distinct dense cluster(s) (more than 6 notes in 100ms).\"\n        )\n        \n    if res.compressed_holds > 5:\n        if severity == \"low\":\n            severity = \"medium\"\n        reasons_list.append(\"compressed holds\")\n        recommendations.append(\n            f\"{res.compressed_holds} note holds were compressed due to dense scheduling.\"\n        )\n        \n    if res.max_polyphony > 8:\n        if severity == \"low\":\n            severity = \"medium\"\n        reasons_list.append(\"high polyphony\")\n        recommendations.append(\n            f\"High polyphony detected (max {res.max_polyphony} simultaneous keys).\"\n        )\n        \n    if not recommendations:\n        recommendations.append(\"No timing conflicts detected. Balanced playback is recommended.\")\n    \n    return severity, recommendations, reasons_list\n\ndef analyze_schedule(res: ScheduleResult, raw_notes: tuple[Any, ...] | None = None) -> ScheduleRiskReport:\n    \"\"\"Analyze a ScheduleResult and optional raw notes to detect timing conflicts, density risks, and suggest overrides.\"\"\"\n    down_events = sorted([action for action in res.actions if action.kind == \"down\"], key=lambda a: a.at_us)\n    \n    dense_clusters_list = _find_dense_clusters(down_events)\n    raw_min_any_note_gap_us, raw_min_same_key_gap_us = _compute_min_gaps(res, raw_notes)\n\n    # Compute note density metrics\n    duration_sec = res.source_duration_us / 1_000_000\n    n = len(down_events)\n    average_notes_per_second = n / duration_sec if duration_sec > 0 else 0.0\n    \n    peak_notes_per_second_1s = 0\n    left_1s = 0\n    for right_1s in range(n):\n        while down_events[right_1s].at_us - down_events[left_1s].at_us > 1_000_000:\n            left_1s += 1\n        peak_notes_per_second_1s = max(peak_notes_per_second_1s, right_1s - left_1s + 1)\n        \n    severity, recommendations, reasons_list = _evaluate_risk_severity(res, dense_clusters_list)\n    reason = f\"{' and '.join(reasons_list)} detected\" if reasons_list else \"No timing conflicts detected.\"\n    \n    # 7. Unified Recommendation Engine decisions (P1.3)\n    has_repeats = res.impossible_same_key_repeats > 0 or res.risky_same_key_repeats > 0\n    high_poly = res.max_polyphony >= 5\n    \n    if severity == \"high\":\n        suggested_profile = \"dense-safe\" if has_repeats else \"remote-safe\"\n        suggested_tempo_scale = 0.92\n    elif severity == \"medium\":\n        suggested_profile = \"remote-safe\" if high_poly else \"balanced\"\n        suggested_tempo_scale = 0.95\n    else:\n        suggested_profile = \"balanced\"\n        suggested_tempo_scale = 1.00\n        \n    max_chord_size = max(len(a.scan_codes) for a in down_events) if down_events else 0\n    chords_count = sum(1 for a in down_events if len(a.scan_codes) > 1)\n    note_count = len(raw_notes) if raw_notes else n\n    timing_stress_rate = (res.impossible_same_key_repeats / note_count * 100) if note_count > 0 else 0.0\n\n    return ScheduleRiskReport(\n        severity=severity,\n        impossible_repeats=res.impossible_same_key_repeats,\n        impossible_same_key_repeats=res.impossible_same_key_repeats,\n        compressed_holds=res.compressed_holds,\n        max_polyphony=res.max_polyphony,\n        min_any_note_gap_us=raw_min_any_note_gap_us,\n        min_same_key_gap_us=raw_min_same_key_gap_us,\n        dense_clusters=tuple(dense_clusters_list),\n        recommendations=tuple(recommendations),\n        average_notes_per_second=average_notes_per_second,\n        peak_notes_per_second_1s=float(peak_notes_per_second_1s),\n        suggested_profile=suggested_profile,\n        suggested_tempo_scale=suggested_tempo_scale,\n        reason=reason,\n        max_chord_size=max_chord_size,\n        chords_count=chords_count,\n        timing_stress_rate=timing_stress_rate\n    )\n",
    "file_path": "src/sky_music/domain/analyzer.py"
  },
  "id": "write_file__write_file_1780182995091_0"
}

{

    "content": "from dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import Any, Literal\nfrom sky_music.domain.scheduler_types import ScheduleResult\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)\nclass DenseCluster:\n    start_us: int\n    end_us: int\n    note_count: int\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)\nclass ScheduleRiskReport:\n    severity: Literal[\"low\", \"medium\", \"high\"]\n    impossible_repeats: int\n    impossible_same_key_repeats: int\n    compressed_holds: int\n    max_polyphony: int\n    min_any_note_gap_us: int | None\n    min_same_key_gap_us: int | None\n    dense_clusters: tuple[DenseCluster, ...]\n    recommendations: tuple[str, ...]\n    average_notes_per_second: float = 0.0\n    peak_notes_per_second_1s: float = 0.0\n    suggested_profile: str = \"balanced\"\n    suggested_tempo_scale: float = 1.0\n    reason: str = \"\"\n    max_chord_size: int = 0\n    chords_count: int = 0\n    timing_stress_rate: float = 0.0\n\ndef _find_dense_clusters(down_events: list[Any]) -> list[DenseCluster]:\n    \"\"\"Sliding Window O(n) scan to identify dense clusters (> 6 notes within any 100ms)\"\"\"\n    dense_clusters_list = []\n    left = 0\n    n = len(down_events)\n    for right in range(n):\n        while down_events[right].at_us - down_events[left].at_us > 100_000:\n            left += 1\n            \n        note_count = right - left + 1\n        if note_count > 6:\n            start_us = down_events[left].at_us\n            end_us = down_events[right].at_us\n            \n            # Coalesce/merge overlapping dense clusters to avoid duplicate warnings\n            if dense_clusters_list and start_us <= dense_clusters_list[-1].end_us + 50_000:\n                prev = dense_clusters_list[-1]\n                dense_clusters_list[-1] = DenseCluster(\n                    start_us=prev.start_us,\n                    end_us=end_us,\n                    note_count=max(prev.note_count, note_count)\n                )\n            else:\n                dense_clusters_list.append(DenseCluster(\n                    start_us=start_us,\n                    end_us=end_us,\n                    note_count=note_count\n                ))\n    return dense_clusters_list\n\ndef _compute_min_gaps(res: ScheduleResult, raw_notes: tuple[Any, ...] | None) -> tuple[int | None, int | None]:\n    \"\"\"Compute minimum gap between ANY two notes and SAME physical key.\"\"\"\n    down_events = sorted([action for action in res.actions if action.kind == \"down\"], key=lambda a: a.at_us)\n    n = len(down_events)\n    \n    # Post-scheduler fallback\n    min_any_note_gap_us = None\n    if n > 1:\n        min_any_note_gap_us = min(down_events[i].at_us - down_events[i-1].at_us for i in range(1, n))\n        \n    min_same_key_gap_us = None\n    key_last_down = {}\n    same_key_gaps = []\n    \n    for action in res.actions:\n        if action.kind == \"down\":\n            for sc in action.scan_codes:\n                if sc in key_last_down:\n                    same_key_gaps.append(action.at_us - key_last_down[sc])\n                key_last_down[sc] = action.at_us\n                \n    if same_key_gaps:\n        min_same_key_gap_us = min(same_key_gaps)\n\n    # Compute metrics from raw, un-deduplicated notes if provided\n    raw_min_any_note_gap_us = min_any_note_gap_us\n    raw_min_same_key_gap_us = min_same_key_gap_us\n    \n    if raw_notes:\n        sorted_notes = sorted(raw_notes, key=lambda note: note.time_ms)\n        onsets = sorted(list(set(note.time_ms for note in sorted_notes)))\n        if len(onsets) > 1:\n            raw_min_any_note_gap_us = min(onsets[i] - onsets[i-1] for i in range(1, len(onsets))) * 1000\n            \n        key_last_ms = {}\n        same_key_gaps_ms = []\n        for note in sorted_notes:\n            k = note.key\n            if k in key_last_ms:\n                same_key_gaps_ms.append(note.time_ms - key_last_ms[k])\n            key_last_ms[k] = note.time_ms\n        if same_key_gaps_ms:\n            raw_min_same_key_gap_us = min(same_key_gaps_ms) * 1000\n            \n    return raw_min_any_note_gap_us, raw_min_same_key_gap_us\n\ndef _evaluate_risk_severity(res: ScheduleResult, dense_clusters_list: list[DenseCluster]) -> tuple[Literal[\"low\", \"medium\", \"high\"], list[str], list[str]]:\n    severity: Literal[\"low\", \"medium\", \"high\"] = \"low\"\n    recommendations = []\n    reasons_list = []\n    \n    if res.impossible_same_key_repeats > 0:\n        severity = \"high\"\n        reasons_list.append(\"same-key repeats\")\n        recommendations.append(\n            f\"{res.impossible_same_key_repeats} repeated notes are too close for the current timing profile.\"\n        )\n        recommendations.append(\n            \"Some holds were shortened, which may cause dropped notes.\"\n        )\n        \n    if res.risky_same_key_repeats > 0:\n        if severity == \"low\":\n            severity = \"medium\"\n        reasons_list.append(\"risky repeats\")\n        recommendations.append(\n            f\"Detected {res.risky_same_key_repeats} risky same-key repeat(s) close to min hold.\"\n        )\n        \n    if res.shortest_same_key_interval_us is not None:\n        recommendations.append(\n            f\"Shortest same-key repeat interval: {res.shortest_same_key_interval_us / 1000.0:.1f}ms.\"\n        )\n        \n    dense_count = len(dense_clusters_list)\n    if dense_count > 5:\n        if severity != \"high\":\n            severity = \"high\" if dense_count > 15 else \"medium\"\n        reasons_list.append(\"dense clusters\")\n        recommendations.append(\n            f\"Detected {dense_count} distinct dense cluster(s) (more than 6 notes in 100ms).\"\n        )\n        \n    if res.compressed_holds > 5:\n        if severity == \"low\":\n            severity = \"medium\"\n        reasons_list.append(\"compressed holds\")\n        recommendations.append(\n            f\"{res.compressed_holds} note holds were compressed due to dense scheduling.\"\n        )\n        \n    if res.max_polyphony > 8:\n        if severity == \"low\":\n            severity = \"medium\"\n        reasons_list.append(\"high polyphony\")\n        recommendations.append(\n            f\"High polyphony detected (max {res.max_polyphony} simultaneous keys).\"\n        )\n        \n    if not recommendations:\n        recommendations.append(\"No timing conflicts detected. Balanced playback is recommended.\")\n    \n    return severity, recommendations, reasons_list\n\ndef analyze_schedule(res: ScheduleResult, raw_notes: tuple[Any, ...] | None = None) -> ScheduleRiskReport:\n    \"\"\"Analyze a ScheduleResult and optional raw notes to detect timing conflicts, density risks, and suggest overrides.\"\"\"\n    down_events = sorted([action for action in res.actions if action.kind == \"down\"], key=lambda a: a.at_us)\n    \n    dense_clusters_list = _find_dense_clusters(down_events)\n    raw_min_any_note_gap_us, raw_min_same_key_gap_us = _compute_min_gaps(res, raw_notes)\n\n    # Compute note density metrics\n    duration_sec = res.source_duration_us / 1_000_000\n    n = len(down_events)\n    average_notes_per_second = n / duration_sec if duration_sec > 0 else 0.0\n    \n    peak_notes_per_second_1s = 0\n    left_1s = 0\n    for right_1s in range(n):\n        while down_events[right_1s].at_us - down_events[left_1s].at_us > 1_000_000:\n            left_1s += 1\n        peak_notes_per_second_1s = max(peak_notes_per_second_1s, right_1s - left_1s + 1)\n        \n    severity, recommendations, reasons_list = _evaluate_risk_severity(res, dense_clusters_list)\n    reason = f\"{' and '.join(reasons_list)} detected\" if reasons_list else \"No timing conflicts detected.\"\n    \n    # 7. Unified Recommendation Engine decisions (P1.3)\n    has_repeats = res.impossible_same_key_repeats > 0 or res.risky_same_key_repeats > 0\n    high_poly = res.max_polyphony >= 5\n    \n    if severity == \"high\":\n        suggested_profile = \"dense-safe\" if has_repeats else \"remote-safe\"\n        suggested_tempo_scale = 0.92\n    elif severity == \"medium\":\n        suggested_profile = \"remote-safe\" if high_poly else \"balanced\"\n        suggested_tempo_scale = 0.95\n    else:\n        suggested_profile = \"balanced\"\n        suggested_tempo_scale = 1.00\n        \n    max_chord_size = max(len(a.scan_codes) for a in down_events) if down_events else 0\n    chords_count = sum(1 for a in down_events if len(a.scan_codes) > 1)\n    note_count = len(raw_notes) if raw_notes else n\n    timing_stress_rate = (res.impossible_same_key_repeats / note_count * 100) if note_count > 0 else 0.0\n\n    return ScheduleRiskReport(\n        severity=severity,\n        impossible_repeats=res.impossible_same_key_repeats,\n        impossible_same_key_repeats=res.impossible_same_key_repeats,\n        compressed_holds=res.compressed_holds,\n        max_polyphony=res.max_polyphony,\n        min_any_note_gap_us=raw_min_any_note_gap_us,\n        min_same_key_gap_us=raw_min_same_key_gap_us,\n        dense_clusters=tuple(dense_clusters_list),\n        recommendations=tuple(recommendations),\n        average_notes_per_second=average_notes_per_second,\n        peak_notes_per_second_1s=float(peak_notes_per_second_1s),\n        suggested_profile=suggested_profile,\n        suggested_tempo_scale=suggested_tempo_scale,\n        reason=reason,\n        max_chord_size=max_chord_size,\n        chords_count=chords_count,\n        timing_stress_rate=timing_stress_rate\n    )\n",
    "file_path": "src/sky_music/domain/analyzer.py"
  },
  "id": "write_file__write_file_1780183053227_0"
}
```

## MODEL ✨

**Tool Command**:
```json
{
  "name": "write_file",
  "args": {
    "content": "import json\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom sky_music.domain.domain import Song, Note, NoteKey, Millis\nfrom sky_music.domain.validation import SongParseError, SongValidationError, validate_song_structure\nfrom sky_music.layouts import SKY_15_KEY_PROFILE\n\ndef _parse_note(idx: int, raw_note: Any, profile: Any, filepath_str: str) -> Note:\n    \"\"\"Helper to parse a single note object.\"\"\"\n    if not isinstance(raw_note, dict):\n        raise SongValidationError(f\"[{filepath_str}] Note index {idx} must be a JSON object, got {type(raw_note).__name__}\")\n        \n    if \"time\" not in raw_note:\n        raise SongValidationError(f\"[{filepath_str}] Note index {idx} is missing 'time'\")\n    if \"key\" not in raw_note:\n        raise SongValidationError(f\"[{filepath_str}] Note index {idx} is missing 'key'\")\n        \n    t = raw_note[\"time\"]\n    k = raw_note[\"key\"]\n    \n    # Verify timestamp\n    if not isinstance(t, int):\n        try:\n            t = int(t)\n        except (ValueError, TypeError):\n            raise SongValidationError(f\"[{filepath_str}] Note index {idx} has invalid time: {t!r} (expected integer)\")\n            \n    if t < 0:\n        raise SongValidationError(f\"[{filepath_str}] Note index {idx} has negative timestamp: {t}\")\n        \n    # Verify note mapping\n    if k not in profile.key_map:\n        raise SongValidationError(\n            f\"[{filepath_str}] Note index {idx} has unmapped key: {k!r}. \"\n            f\"Must be one of: {', '.join(sorted(profile.key_map.keys()))}\"\n        )\n        \n    return Note(time_ms=Millis(t), key=NoteKey(k))\n\ndef parse_song_file(filepath: Path, profile=None) -> Song:\n    \"\"\"Parses a song file (JSON or skysheet) strictly and validates all notes against the profile keymap.\"\"\"\n    if profile is None:\n        profile = SKY_15_KEY_PROFILE\n    filepath_str = filepath.name\n    \n    if not filepath.exists():\n        raise SongParseError(f\"File not found: {filepath}\")\n        \n    try:\n        with filepath.open('r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            data = json.load(f)\n    except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:\n        raise SongParseError(f\"[{filepath_str}] Invalid JSON formatting: {exc}\")\n        \n    # Support lists at root (e.g. legacy structure was an array [song_dict])\n    if isinstance(data, list):\n        if not data:\n            raise SongValidationError(f\"[{filepath_str}] Empty song list\")\n        song_dict = data[0]\n    else:\n        song_dict = data\n        \n    validate_song_structure(song_dict, filepath_str)\n    \n    song_name = song_dict.get(\"name\", filepath.stem)\n    notes_list = [\n        _parse_note(idx, raw_note, profile, filepath_str) \n        for idx, raw_note in enumerate(song_dict[\"songNotes\"])\n    ]\n        \n    # Sort stably by time\n    notes_list.sort(key=lambda n: n.time_ms)\n    \n    return Song(name=song_name, notes=tuple(notes_list))\n",
    "file_path": "src/sky_music/domain/parser.py"
  },
  "id": "write_file__write_file_1780183065876_0"
}
```

## MODEL ✨

The refactoring is complete.

### Summary of Changes:
1.  **`src/sky_music/domain/analyzer.py`**:
    *   Decomposed the monolithic `analyze_schedule` function into smaller, focused helper functions: `_find_dense_clusters`, `_compute_min_gaps`, and `_evaluate_risk_severity`.
    *   Maintained the external API of `analyze_schedule` for backward compatibility.
2.  **`src/sky_music/domain/parser.py`**:
    *   Improved import management by moving `SKY_15_KEY_PROFILE` to the top.
    *   Extracted the individual note parsing logic into a helper function `_parse_note` to reduce nesting and improve readability.

### Verification:
*   Successfully ran the full test suite (`pytest`) using `uv run pytest`.
*   All 81 tests passed, ensuring no regressions were introduced by the refactoring.

## MODEL ✨

Với công việc refactoring đã hoàn tất và được kiểm chứng thành công, đây là một số gợi ý cho bước tiếp theo dựa trên các thực hành kỹ thuật tốt nhất:

1.  **Khảo sát nợ kỹ thuật (Technical Debt) tại các module khác:** Kiểm tra các thư mục như `src/sky_music/infrastructure/` hoặc `src/sky_music/orchestration/`. Các module này thường chứa logic phức tạp và có thể có những phần trùng lặp hoặc cần được cấu trúc lại tương tự như `analyzer.py` đã làm.
2.  **Cải thiện độ bao phủ của Test (Test Coverage):** Mặc dù đã chạy pass toàn bộ test hiện có, bạn có thể kiểm tra xem việc refactoring vừa rồi có cần bổ sung thêm Unit Test riêng biệt cho các hàm helper mới (`_find_dense_clusters`, `_parse_note`, v.v.) để đảm bảo tính cô lập và bền vững hơn không.
3.  **Tài liệu hóa (Documentation):** Cập nhật hoặc bổ sung docstring/tài liệu nếu cần thiết để phản ánh cấu trúc code mới, giúp việc duy trì sau này dễ dàng hơn cho bạn hoặc người khác.
4.  **Chuyển sang mục tiêu tiếp theo:** Nếu bạn cảm thấy code đã đủ tối ưu, chúng ta có thể bắt đầu triển khai các tính năng mới hoặc cải tiến hiệu năng theo roadmap của dự án.

Đây là một module cốt lõi (14.9KB) chịu trách nhiệm quản lý vòng lặp thực thi thời gian thực (`PlaybackEngine`). Nó có độ phức tạp cao, tích hợp nhiều thành phần (`backend`, `telemetry`, `clock`, `focus_guard`).

**Tại sao nên refactor `engine.py`:**
*   **Độ phức tạp cao:** Hàm khởi tạo (`__init__`) có rất nhiều tham số, và các hàm quản lý vòng lặp thời gian thực (`_execute_action`, `get_elapsed_us`) rất quan trọng nhưng cũng dễ mắc lỗi.
*   **Khả năng kiểm thử:** Việc tách nhỏ các hàm xử lý logic thời gian thực và quản lý trạng thái sẽ giúp việc viết Unit Test cho engine trở nên khả thi và dễ dàng hơn nhiều.

## MODEL ✨

Phân tích `src/sky_music/orchestration/engine.py` cho thấy các vấn đề chính sau:

1.  **Hàm `play()` quá dài và hỗn hợp các trách nhiệm:**
    *   Quản lý vòng lặp thực thi (playback loop).
    *   Quản lý trạng thái tạm dừng (manual/focus pause).
    *   Xử lý đầu vào người dùng (`controls.poll()`).
    *   Kết xuất giao diện (`renderer.render()`).
    *   Quản lý thời gian (`clock`, `sleeper`, `precise_sleeper`).
    *   Thu thập và báo cáo telemetry.
2.  **Logic vòng lặp (`while True`) trong `play()` quá phức tạp:** Việc xử lý các sự kiện tạm dừng, mất focus, và throttled rendering được nhồi nhét chung trong vòng lặp chính làm code khó đọc và dễ xảy ra lỗi side-effect.
3.  **Khởi tạo `PlaybackEngine` cồng kềnh:** Hàm `__init__` nhận quá nhiều tham số (Dependency Injection thủ công), làm cho việc khởi tạo engine trở nên phức tạp và khó kiểm thử unit test.

### Đề xuất Kế hoạch Refactoring:

1.  **Tách logic `play()`:**
    *   Tách biệt logic xử lý trạng thái (pause, focus) ra khỏi vòng lặp chính.
    *   Tách biệt logic xử lý lệnh điều khiển (input command parsing) thành các phương thức riêng.
    *   Tách biệt logic rendering ra khỏi vòng lặp thực thi.
2.  **Cải thiện Dependency Injection:** Sử dụng một dataclass `EngineConfig` hoặc tương tự để nhóm các tham số cấu hình trong `__init__`.
3.  **Trích xuất lớp xử lý trạng thái:** Tạo một lớp nhỏ (ví dụ: `PlaybackStateManager`) để quản lý các biến trạng thái như `pause_time_us`, `manual_pause_started_us`, v.v.

Bạn có đồng ý với hướng tiếp cận này không? Nếu đồng ý, tôi sẽ tạo một bản kế hoạch chi tiết hơn trong file `plans/refactor-engine.md`.

{
  "name": "write_file",
  "args": {
    "content": "# Refactor Playback Engine (`src/sky_music/orchestration/engine.py`)\n\n## Objective\nReduce cyclomatic complexity of `PlaybackEngine.play()` and improve maintainability/testability of the orchestration layer by decomposing monolithic methods and improving dependency management.\n\n## Key Files & Context\n- `src/sky_music/orchestration/engine.py`: Core playback logic, currently monolithic.\n\n## Proposed Solution\n\n### 1. Simplify Dependency Management\n- Introduce a `PlaybackConfig` dataclass to hold the many optional dependencies/configurations for `PlaybackEngine`. This will clean up the `__init__` signature.\n\n### 2. Extract State Management\n- Create a `PlaybackState` class to manage:\n    - `start_perf`, `pause_time_us`, `manual_pause_started_us`, `focus_pause_started_us`.\n    - Provide methods like `is_paused()` and `update_pause_times()`.\n\n### 3. Decompose `PlaybackEngine.play()`\n- Extract the input polling logic into `_handle_commands(command)`.\n- Extract focus/pause logic into `_process_wait_states()`.\n- Extract the rendering throttle logic into `_handle_rendering(elapsed_us, total_time_seconds)`.\n- Refactor the main loop to call these smaller, focused methods.\n\n## Alternatives Considered\n- **No Refactoring:** Too much technical debt in the orchestration layer; makes adding future engine features (e.g., better timing precision, dynamic tempo changes) risky.\n- **Micro-services/Event-driven:** Over-engineering; this is a single-threaded performance-sensitive loop.\n\n## Phased Implementation Plan\n1. **Prepare:** Define `PlaybackConfig` and `PlaybackState` classes.\n2. **Refactor State:** Migrate internal state variables from `PlaybackEngine` to `PlaybackState`.\n3. **Refactor Loop:** Decompose `play()` into private methods incrementally.\n4. **Test:** Run existing regression tests after each extracted method.\n\n## Verification\n- Unit test the `PlaybackState` and `PlaybackConfig` classes.\n- Verify playback behavior via `tests/test_playback.py` and `tests/test_engine_refactor.py`.\n",
    "file_path": "C:/Users/pumz/.gemini/tmp/sky-player/1ba404c1-8f8b-49bd-9c57-cc31e3d7ad2f/plans/refactor-engine.md"
  },
  "id": "write_file__write_file_1780183603514_0"
}

## MODEL ✨

Kế hoạch refactoring cho `engine.py` đã được lập chi tiết. Bạn vui lòng xem qua các điểm chính trong tài liệu kế hoạch:

# Refactor Playback Engine (`src/sky_music/orchestration/engine.py`)

## Objective
Giảm độ phức tạp vòng lặp và cải thiện khả năng bảo trì của `PlaybackEngine.play()` bằng cách phân tách các phương thức và quản lý dependency tốt hơn.

## Các bước triển khai chính
1.  **Đơn giản hóa Dependency Management**: Sử dụng `PlaybackConfig` dataclass để nhóm tham số khởi tạo.
2.  **Tách quản lý trạng thái**: Tạo `PlaybackState` class để quản lý các biến trạng thái runtime.
3.  **Phân tách `play()`**: Chia nhỏ các logic xử lý command, trạng thái chờ (wait states), và rendering thành các private method riêng biệt.

## Kiểm chứng
- Unit test cho các class mới.
- Chạy lại bộ test regression hiện tại (`tests/test_playback.py`, `tests/test_engine_refactor.py`) sau mỗi bước.

{
  "name": "replace",
  "args": {
    "new_string": "from dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import Tuple, Optional, Any\nfrom sky_music.domain.domain import Song\nfrom sky_music.domain.scheduler_types import KeyAction\nfrom sky_music.infrastructure.backend import InputBackend\nfrom sky_music.orchestration.telemetry import TelemetryLogger\nfrom sky_music.infrastructure.timing import Clock, Sleeper, PerfCounterClock, RealSleeper, SleepPolicy, PreciseSleeper\nfrom sky_music.infrastructure.focus import FocusGuard, NoopFocusGuard, Win32SkyFocusGuard\n\n# We use standard outputs from UI and main\nPLAYBACK_FINISHED = \"finished\"\nPLAYBACK_SKIPPED = \"skipped\"\nPLAYBACK_QUIT = \"quit\"\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)\nclass ExecutionResult:\n    \"\"\"Result of executing a single KeyAction — used for telemetry and late compensation.\"\"\"\n    event_index: int\n    scheduled_us: int\n    actual_us: int\n    lateness_us: int           # actual_us - scheduled_us; negative means early (should not happen)\n    send_duration_us: int      # wall-clock time the backend call took\n    is_late: bool              # True when lateness_us > 0\n    is_critically_late: bool   # True when lateness_us > 10_000 (10 ms)\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass PlaybackConfig:\n    \"\"\"Configuration and optional dependencies for PlaybackEngine.\"\"\"\n    telemetry_enabled: bool = False\n    require_focus: bool = True\n    clock: Optional[Clock] = None\n    sleeper: Optional[Sleeper] = None\n    sleep_policy: SleepPolicy = SleepPolicy()\n    focus_guard: Optional[FocusGuard] = None\n    profile_name: str = \"balanced\"\n    tempo_scale: float = 1.0\n    focus_restore_grace_us: int = 100_000\n    fps: Optional[int] = None\n    controls: Any = None\n    renderer: Any = None\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass PlaybackState:\n    \"\"\"Manages the runtime state of the playback loop.\"\"\"\n    start_perf: int\n    pause_time_us: int = 0\n    manual_pause_started_us: Optional[int] = None\n    focus_pause_started_us: Optional[int] = None\n\n    def is_paused(self) -> bool:\n        return self.manual_pause_started_us is not None or self.focus_pause_started_us is not None\n\n    def get_elapsed_us(self, clock: Clock) -> int:\n        \"\"\"Compute elapsed playback time in microseconds, accounting for pauses.\"\"\"\n        now_us = clock.now_us()\n        elapsed = now_us - self.start_perf - self.pause_time_us\n        if self.manual_pause_started_us is not None:\n            elapsed -= (now_us - self.manual_pause_started_us)\n        if self.focus_pause_started_us is not None:\n            elapsed -= (now_us - self.focus_pause_started_us)\n        return max(0, elapsed)\n\n\nclass PlaybackEngine:\n",
    "instruction": "Introduce PlaybackConfig and PlaybackState dataclasses to manage engine configuration and runtime state.",
    "file_path": "src/sky_music/orchestration/engine.py",
    "old_string": "from dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import Tuple, Optional\nfrom sky_music.domain.domain import Song\nfrom sky_music.domain.scheduler_types import KeyAction\nfrom sky_music.infrastructure.backend import InputBackend\nfrom sky_music.orchestration.telemetry import TelemetryLogger\nfrom sky_music.infrastructure.timing import Clock, Sleeper, PerfCounterClock, RealSleeper, SleepPolicy, PreciseSleeper\nfrom sky_music.infrastructure.focus import FocusGuard, NoopFocusGuard, Win32SkyFocusGuard\n\n# We use standard outputs from UI and main\nPLAYBACK_FINISHED = \"finished\"\nPLAYBACK_SKIPPED = \"skipped\"\nPLAYBACK_QUIT = \"quit\"\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)\nclass ExecutionResult:\n    \"\"\"Result of executing a single KeyAction — used for telemetry and late compensation.\"\"\"\n    event_index: int\n    scheduled_us: int\n    actual_us: int\n    lateness_us: int           # actual_us - scheduled_us; negative means early (should not happen)\n    send_duration_us: int      # wall-clock time the backend call took\n    is_late: bool              # True when lateness_us > 0\n    is_critically_late: bool   # True when lateness_us > 10_000 (10 ms)\n\nclass PlaybackEngine:\n"

}

{
  "name": "replace",
  "args": {
    "instruction": "Update PlaybackEngine constructor to use PlaybackConfig.",
    "new_string": "    def __init__(\n        self,\n        song: Song,\n        actions: Tuple[KeyAction, ...],\n        backend: InputBackend,\n        config: PlaybackConfig = PlaybackConfig()\n    ):\n        self.song = song\n        self.actions = actions\n        self.backend = backend\n        self.config = config\n        self.focus_restore_grace_us = config.focus_restore_grace_us\n        self.controls = config.controls\n        self.renderer = config.renderer\n        self.telemetry = TelemetryLogger(\n            song.name,\n            enabled=config.telemetry_enabled,\n            profile_name=config.profile_name,\n            tempo_scale=config.tempo_scale,\n            fps=config.fps\n        )\n        self.require_focus = config.require_focus\n        self.clock = config.clock if config.clock is not None else PerfCounterClock()\n        self.sleeper = config.sleeper if config.sleeper is not None else RealSleeper()\n        self.sleep_policy = config.sleep_policy\n        self.precise_sleeper = PreciseSleeper()\n        if self.renderer is not None:\n            self.renderer.backend = self.backend\n        \n        # Inject standard FocusGuard depending on requirements\n        if config.focus_guard is None:\n            if self.require_focus:\n                self.focus_guard: FocusGuard = Win32SkyFocusGuard()\n            else:\n                self.focus_guard = NoopFocusGuard()\n        else:\n            self.focus_guard = config.focus_guard\n",
    "old_string": "    def __init__(\n        self,\n        song: Song,\n        actions: Tuple[KeyAction, ...],\n        backend: InputBackend,\n        controls = None,\n        renderer = None,\n        telemetry_enabled: bool = False,\n        require_focus: bool = True,\n        clock: Optional[Clock] = None,\n        sleeper: Optional[Sleeper] = None,\n        sleep_policy: SleepPolicy = SleepPolicy(),\n        focus_guard: Optional[FocusGuard] = None,\n        profile_name: str = \"balanced\",\n        tempo_scale: float = 1.0,\n        focus_restore_grace_us: int = 100_000,\n        fps: Optional[int] = None\n    ):\n        self.song = song\n        self.actions = actions\n        self.focus_restore_grace_us = focus_restore_grace_us\n        self.backend = backend\n        self.controls = controls\n        self.renderer = renderer\n        self.telemetry = TelemetryLogger(\n            song.name,\n            enabled=telemetry_enabled,\n            profile_name=profile_name,\n            tempo_scale=tempo_scale,\n            fps=fps\n        )\n        self.require_focus = require_focus\n        self.clock = clock if clock is not None else PerfCounterClock()\n        self.sleeper = sleeper if sleeper is not None else RealSleeper()\n        self.sleep_policy = sleep_policy\n        self.precise_sleeper = PreciseSleeper()\n        if self.renderer is not None:\n            self.renderer.backend = self.backend\n        \n        # Inject standard FocusGuard depending on requirements\n        if focus_guard is None:\n            if self.require_focus:\n                self.focus_guard: FocusGuard = Win32SkyFocusGuard()\n            else:\n                self.focus_guard = NoopFocusGuard()\n        else:\n            self.focus_guard = focus_guard\n",
    "file_path": "src/sky_music/orchestration/engine.py"
  },

    "new_string": "    def __init__(\n        self,\n        song: Song,\n        actions: Tuple[KeyAction, ...],\n        backend: InputBackend,\n        controls = None,\n        renderer = None,\n        telemetry_enabled: bool = False,\n        require_focus: bool = True,\n        clock: Optional[Clock] = None,\n        sleeper: Optional[Sleeper] = None,\n        sleep_policy: SleepPolicy = SleepPolicy(),\n        focus_guard: Optional[FocusGuard] = None,\n        profile_name: str = \"balanced\",\n        tempo_scale: float = 1.0,\n        focus_restore_grace_us: int = 100_000,\n        fps: Optional[int] = None\n    ):\n        self.song = song\n        self.actions = actions\n        self.backend = backend\n        \n        # Internal configuration from parameters\n        self.config = PlaybackConfig(\n            telemetry_enabled=telemetry_enabled,\n            require_focus=require_focus,\n            clock=clock,\n            sleeper=sleeper,\n            sleep_policy=sleep_policy,\n            focus_guard=focus_guard,\n            profile_name=profile_name,\n            tempo_scale=tempo_scale,\n            focus_restore_grace_us=focus_restore_grace_us,\n            fps=fps,\n            controls=controls,\n            renderer=renderer\n        )\n        \n        self.focus_restore_grace_us = self.config.focus_restore_grace_us\n        self.controls = self.config.controls\n        self.renderer = self.config.renderer\n        self.telemetry = TelemetryLogger(\n            song.name,\n            enabled=self.config.telemetry_enabled,\n            profile_name=self.config.profile_name,\n            tempo_scale=self.config.tempo_scale,\n            fps=self.config.fps\n        )\n        self.require_focus = self.config.require_focus\n        self.clock = self.config.clock if self.config.clock is not None else PerfCounterClock()\n        self.sleeper = self.config.sleeper if self.config.sleeper is not None else RealSleeper()\n        self.sleep_policy = self.config.sleep_policy\n        self.precise_sleeper = PreciseSleeper()\n        if self.renderer is not None:\n            self.renderer.backend = self.backend\n        \n        # Inject standard FocusGuard depending on requirements\n        if self.config.focus_guard is None:\n            if self.require_focus:\n                self.focus_guard: FocusGuard = Win32SkyFocusGuard()\n            else:\n                self.focus_guard = NoopFocusGuard()\n        else:\n            self.focus_guard = self.config.focus_guard\n",
    "instruction": "Restore backward compatibility to PlaybackEngine constructor while still using PlaybackConfig internally.",

{
  "name": "replace",
  "args": {
    "file_path": "src/sky_music/orchestration/engine.py",
    "instruction": "Update PlaybackEngine.play() to use PlaybackState instead of local variables.",
    "old_string": "    def play(self) -> str:\n        # Wait for initial focus if required to prevent \"Focus lost\" showing immediately at start\n        if self.require_focus and not self.focus_guard.is_active():\n            self.backend.release_all()\n            if self.renderer:\n                self.renderer.render(0.0, 0.001, self.song.name, status=\"waiting_for_focus\", force=True)\n            while self.require_focus and not self.focus_guard.is_active():\n                command = self.controls.poll() if self.controls is not None else None\n                if command == \"quit\":\n                    if self.renderer:\n                        self.renderer.finish(f\"Stopped: {self.song.name}\")\n                    return PLAYBACK_QUIT\n                if command == \"refocus\":\n                    self.focus_guard.focus()\n                if command == \"panic\":\n                    self.backend.release_all()\n                self.sleeper.sleep(self.sleep_policy.poll_s)\n\n        start_perf = self.clock.now_us()\n        pause_time_us = 0\n        manual_pause_started_us: Optional[int] = None\n        focus_pause_started_us: Optional[int] = None\n        first_action_executed = False\n        last_render_time_us = 0\n\n        total_time_us = max(a.at_us for a in self.actions) if self.actions else 0\n        total_time_seconds = total_time_us / 1_000_000\n\n        # Telemetry diagnostic counters\n        late_events_over_2ms = 0\n        late_events_over_5ms = 0\n        late_events_over_10ms = 0\n        max_lateness_us = 0\n\n        # Convenience closure so inner control-flow code stays readable\n        def _elapsed() -> int:\n            return self.get_elapsed_us(\n                start_perf, pause_time_us, manual_pause_started_us, focus_pause_started_us\n            )\n            \n        # Main execution loop\n        try:\n            for idx, action in enumerate(self.actions):\n                while True:\n                    command = self.controls.poll() if self.controls is not None else None\n                    now_us = self.clock.now_us()\n\n                    if command == \"quit\":\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.finish(f\"Stopped: {self.song.name}\")\n                        return PLAYBACK_QUIT\n\n                    if command == \"skip\":\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.finish(f\"Skipped: {self.song.name}\")\n                        return PLAYBACK_SKIPPED\n\n                    if command == \"refocus\":\n                        self.focus_guard.focus()\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"refocus\", force=True)\n\n                    if command == \"panic\":\n                        # Emergency release: release all currently held keys, then continue playback\n                        self.backend.release_all()\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"panic\", force=True)\n\n                    if command == \"pause\":\n                        if manual_pause_started_us is None:\n                            self.backend.release_all()\n                            manual_pause_started_us = now_us\n                            if self.renderer:\n                                self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"paused\", force=True)\n                        else:\n                            pause_time_us += (now_us - manual_pause_started_us)\n                            manual_pause_started_us = None\n                            if self.renderer:\n                                self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"playing\", force=True)\n\n                    if manual_pause_started_us is not None:\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"paused\")\n                        self.sleeper.sleep(self.sleep_policy.poll_s)\n                        continue\n\n                    # Check target window focus (Windows-specific check isolated behind FocusGuard)\n                    if self.require_focus and not self.focus_guard.is_active():\n                        if focus_pause_started_us is None:\n                            self.backend.release_all()\n                            focus_pause_started_us = self.clock.now_us()\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            status_val = \"waiting_for_focus\" if not first_action_executed else \"focus_lost\"\n                            self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=status_val)\n                        self.sleeper.sleep(self.sleep_policy.poll_s)\n                        continue\n\n                    if focus_pause_started_us is not None:\n                        # Refocus grace period: let game input engine stabilize\n                        grace_us = self.focus_restore_grace_us\n                        grace_start_us = self.clock.now_us()\n                        while self.clock.now_us() - grace_start_us < grace_us:\n                            self.sleeper.sleep(0.005)\n                            if self.controls is not None:\n                                early_cmd = self.controls.poll()\n                                if early_cmd == \"quit\":\n                                    if self.renderer:\n                                        self.renderer.finish(f\"Stopped: {self.song.name}\")\n                                    return PLAYBACK_QUIT\n                                elif early_cmd == \"skip\":\n                                    if self.renderer:\n                                        self.renderer.finish(f\"Skipped: {self.song.name}\")\n                                    return PLAYBACK_SKIPPED\n                                elif early_cmd == \"panic\":\n                                    self.backend.release_all()\n                                    if self.renderer:\n                                        self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"panic\", force=True)\n                                    break\n\n                        pause_time_us += (self.clock.now_us() - focus_pause_started_us)\n                        focus_pause_started_us = None\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"playing\", force=True)\n\n                    elapsed_us = _elapsed()\n                    if elapsed_us >= action.at_us:\n                        break\n\n                    remaining_us = action.at_us - elapsed_us\n\n                    # Throttle rendering: limit to max 30 FPS (~33ms) and skip if within 5ms of an action\n                    should_render = False\n                    if self.renderer and remaining_us >= 5_000:\n                        now_render_us = self.clock.now_us()\n                        if now_render_us - last_render_time_us >= 33_000:\n                            should_render = True\n                            last_render_time_us = now_render_us\n\n                    if should_render:\n                        self.renderer.render(elapsed_us / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"playing\")\n\n                    target_system_us = start_perf + pause_time_us + action.at_us\n                    self.precise_sleeper.sleep_step_towards_us(target_system_us, self.clock, self.sleeper, self.sleep_policy.spin_threshold_us)\n\n                # Execute action via extracted method (telemetry + late tracking inside)\n                first_action_executed = True\n                exec_result = self._execute_action(\n                    idx, action,\n                    start_perf, pause_time_us,\n                    manual_pause_started_us, focus_pause_started_us,\n                )\n\n                lateness_us = exec_result.lateness_us\n                if exec_result.is_late:\n                    max_lateness_us = max(max_lateness_us, lateness_us)\n                    if lateness_us > 2_000:\n                        late_events_over_2ms += 1\n                    if lateness_us > 5_000:\n                        late_events_over_5ms += 1\n                    if exec_result.is_critically_late:\n                        late_events_over_10ms += 1\n\n                if self.renderer and hasattr(self.renderer, 'update_counters'):\n                    self.renderer.update_counters(max(0, lateness_us))\n                \n            if self.renderer:\n                self.renderer.render(total_time_seconds, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"done\", force=True)\n                self.renderer.finish(f\"Finished playing {self.song.name}\")\n                \n            # Log summary diagnostic metrics\n            from sky_music.platform.win32 import inputs\n            if hasattr(inputs, \"PLAYBACK_DEBUG\") and inputs.PLAYBACK_DEBUG:\n                inputs.debug_log(\n                    f\"Timing summary (Microsecond Engine): \"\n                    f\"late events over 2ms={late_events_over_2ms}, \"\n                    f\"late events over 5ms={late_events_over_5ms}, \"\n                    f\"late events over 10ms={late_events_over_10ms}, \"\n                    f\"max lateness={max_lateness_us / 1_000_000:.6f}s\"\n                )\n                \n            return PLAYBACK_FINISHED\n            \n        finally:\n            outcome = self.backend.release_all()\n            self.telemetry.record_release_outcome(outcome)\n            self.telemetry.record_backend_health(self.backend.get_health())\n            self.telemetry.save()\n",
    "new_string": "    def play(self) -> str:\n        # Wait for initial focus if required to prevent \"Focus lost\" showing immediately at start\n        if self.require_focus and not self.focus_guard.is_active():\n            self.backend.release_all()\n            if self.renderer:\n                self.renderer.render(0.0, 0.001, self.song.name, status=\"waiting_for_focus\", force=True)\n            while self.require_focus and not self.focus_guard.is_active():\n                command = self.controls.poll() if self.controls is not None else None\n                if command == \"quit\":\n                    if self.renderer:\n                        self.renderer.finish(f\"Stopped: {self.song.name}\")\n                    return PLAYBACK_QUIT\n                if command == \"refocus\":\n                    self.focus_guard.focus()\n                if command == \"panic\":\n                    self.backend.release_all()\n                self.sleeper.sleep(self.sleep_policy.poll_s)\n\n        state = PlaybackState(start_perf=self.clock.now_us())\n        \n        first_action_executed = False\n        last_render_time_us = 0\n\n        total_time_us = max(a.at_us for a in self.actions) if self.actions else 0\n        total_time_seconds = total_time_us / 1_000_000\n\n        # Telemetry diagnostic counters\n        late_events_over_2ms = 0\n        late_events_over_5ms = 0\n        late_events_over_10ms = 0\n        max_lateness_us = 0\n\n        # Convenience closure so inner control-flow code stays readable\n        def _elapsed() -> int:\n            return state.get_elapsed_us(self.clock)\n            \n        # Main execution loop\n        try:\n            for idx, action in enumerate(self.actions):\n                while True:\n                    command = self.controls.poll() if self.controls is not None else None\n                    now_us = self.clock.now_us()\n\n                    if command == \"quit\":\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.finish(f\"Stopped: {self.song.name}\")\n                        return PLAYBACK_QUIT\n\n                    if command == \"skip\":\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.finish(f\"Skipped: {self.song.name}\")\n                        return PLAYBACK_SKIPPED\n\n                    if command == \"refocus\":\n                        self.focus_guard.focus()\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"refocus\", force=True)\n\n                    if command == \"panic\":\n                        # Emergency release: release all currently held keys, then continue playback\n                        self.backend.release_all()\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"panic\", force=True)\n\n                    if command == \"pause\":\n                        if state.manual_pause_started_us is None:\n                            self.backend.release_all()\n                            state.manual_pause_started_us = now_us\n                            if self.renderer:\n                                self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"paused\", force=True)\n                        else:\n                            state.pause_time_us += (now_us - state.manual_pause_started_us)\n                            state.manual_pause_started_us = None\n                            if self.renderer:\n                                self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"playing\", force=True)\n\n                    if state.manual_pause_started_us is not None:\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"paused\")\n                        self.sleeper.sleep(self.sleep_policy.poll_s)\n                        continue\n\n                    # Check target window focus (Windows-specific check isolated behind FocusGuard)\n                    if self.require_focus and not self.focus_guard.is_active():\n                        if state.focus_pause_started_us is None:\n                            self.backend.release_all()\n                            state.focus_pause_started_us = self.clock.now_us()\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            status_val = \"waiting_for_focus\" if not first_action_executed else \"focus_lost\"\n                            self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=status_val)\n                        self.sleeper.sleep(self.sleep_policy.poll_s)\n                        continue\n\n                    if state.focus_pause_started_us is not None:\n                        # Refocus grace period: let game input engine stabilize\n                        grace_us = self.focus_restore_grace_us\n                        grace_start_us = self.clock.now_us()\n                        while self.clock.now_us() - grace_start_us < grace_us:\n                            self.sleeper.sleep(0.005)\n                            if self.controls is not None:\n                                early_cmd = self.controls.poll()\n                                if early_cmd == \"quit\":\n                                    if self.renderer:\n                                        self.renderer.finish(f\"Stopped: {self.song.name}\")\n                                    return PLAYBACK_QUIT\n                                elif early_cmd == \"skip\":\n                                    if self.renderer:\n                                        self.renderer.finish(f\"Skipped: {self.song.name}\")\n                                    return PLAYBACK_SKIPPED\n                                elif early_cmd == \"panic\":\n                                    self.backend.release_all()\n                                    if self.renderer:\n                                        self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"panic\", force=True)\n                                    break\n\n                        state.pause_time_us += (self.clock.now_us() - state.focus_pause_started_us)\n                        state.focus_pause_started_us = None\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"playing\", force=True)\n\n                    elapsed_us = _elapsed()\n                    if elapsed_us >= action.at_us:\n                        break\n\n                    remaining_us = action.at_us - elapsed_us\n\n                    # Throttle rendering: limit to max 30 FPS (~33ms) and skip if within 5ms of an action\n                    should_render = False\n                    if self.renderer and remaining_us >= 5_000:\n                        now_render_us = self.clock.now_us()\n                        if now_render_us - last_render_time_us >= 33_000:\n                            should_render = True\n                            last_render_time_us = now_render_us\n\n                    if should_render:\n                        self.renderer.render(elapsed_us / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"playing\")\n\n                    target_system_us = state.start_perf + state.pause_time_us + action.at_us\n                    self.precise_sleeper.sleep_step_towards_us(target_system_us, self.clock, self.sleeper, self.sleep_policy.spin_threshold_us)\n\n                # Execute action via extracted method (telemetry + late tracking inside)\n                first_action_executed = True\n                exec_result = self._execute_action(\n                    idx, action,\n                    state.start_perf, state.pause_time_us,\n                    state.manual_pause_started_us, state.focus_pause_started_us,\n                )\n\n                lateness_us = exec_result.lateness_us\n                if exec_result.is_late:\n                    max_lateness_us = max(max_lateness_us, lateness_us)\n                    if lateness_us > 2_000:\n                        late_events_over_2ms += 1\n                    if lateness_us > 5_000:\n                        late_events_over_5ms += 1\n                    if exec_result.is_critically_late:\n                        late_events_over_10ms += 1\n\n                if self.renderer and hasattr(self.renderer, 'update_counters'):\n                    self.renderer.update_counters(max(0, lateness_us))\n                \n            if self.renderer:\n                self.renderer.render(total_time_seconds, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"done\", force=True)\n                self.renderer.finish(f\"Finished playing {self.song.name}\")\n                \n            # Log summary diagnostic metrics\n            from sky_music.platform.win32 import inputs\n            if hasattr(inputs, \"PLAYBACK_DEBUG\") and inputs.PLAYBACK_DEBUG:\n                inputs.debug_log(\n                    f\"Timing summary (Microsecond Engine): \"\n                    f\"late events over 2ms={late_events_over_2ms}, \"\n                    f\"late events over 5ms={late_events_over_5ms}, \"\n                    f\"late events over 10ms={late_events_over_10ms}, \"\n                    f\"max lateness={max_lateness_us / 1_000_000:.6f}s\"\n                )\n                \n            return PLAYBACK_FINISHED\n            \n        finally:\n            outcome = self.backend.release_all()\n            self.telemetry.record_release_outcome(outcome)\n            self.telemetry.record_backend_health(self.backend.get_health())\n            self.telemetry.save()\n"
  },

}

    "new_string": "    def _handle_commands(self, command: Optional[str], state: PlaybackState, total_time_seconds: float) -> Optional[str]:\n        \"\"\"Handles playback commands like pause, skip, quit, etc.\"\"\"\n        if command == \"quit\":\n            if self.renderer:\n                self.renderer.finish(f\"Stopped: {self.song.name}\")\n            return PLAYBACK_QUIT\n        if command == \"skip\":\n            if self.renderer:\n                self.renderer.finish(f\"Skipped: {self.song.name}\")\n            return PLAYBACK_SKIPPED\n        if command == \"refocus\":\n            self.focus_guard.focus()\n            if self.renderer:\n                self.renderer.render(state.get_elapsed_us(self.clock) / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"refocus\", force=True)\n        if command == \"panic\":\n            self.backend.release_all()\n            if self.renderer:\n                self.renderer.render(state.get_elapsed_us(self.clock) / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"panic\", force=True)\n        if command == \"pause\":\n            if state.manual_pause_started_us is None:\n                self.backend.release_all()\n                state.manual_pause_started_us = self.clock.now_us()\n                if self.renderer:\n                    self.renderer.render(state.get_elapsed_us(self.clock) / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"paused\", force=True)\n            else:\n                state.pause_time_us += (self.clock.now_us() - state.manual_pause_started_us)\n                state.manual_pause_started_us = None\n                if self.renderer:\n                    self.renderer.render(state.get_elapsed_us(self.clock) / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"playing\", force=True)\n        return None\n\n    def _process_wait_states(self, state: PlaybackState, first_action_executed: bool, total_time_seconds: float) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Handles focus lost and manual pause wait states.\"\"\"\n        if state.manual_pause_started_us is not None:\n            if self.renderer:\n                self.renderer.render(state.get_elapsed_us(self.clock) / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"paused\")\n            self.sleeper.sleep(self.sleep_policy.poll_s)\n            return True\n\n        if self.require_focus and not self.focus_guard.is_active():\n            if state.focus_pause_started_us is None:\n                self.backend.release_all()\n                state.focus_pause_started_us = self.clock.now_us()\n            if self.renderer:\n                status_val = \"waiting_for_focus\" if not first_action_executed else \"focus_lost\"\n                self.renderer.render(state.get_elapsed_us(self.clock) / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=status_val)\n            self.sleeper.sleep(self.sleep_policy.poll_s)\n            return True\n\n        if state.focus_pause_started_us is not None:\n            grace_us = self.focus_restore_grace_us\n            grace_start_us = self.clock.now_us()\n            while self.clock.now_us() - grace_start_us < grace_us:\n                self.sleeper.sleep(0.005)\n                if self.controls is not None:\n                    early_cmd = self.controls.poll()\n                    if early_cmd == \"quit\":\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.finish(f\"Stopped: {self.song.name}\")\n                        return False # Should be handled by caller\n                    elif early_cmd == \"panic\":\n                        self.backend.release_all()\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.render(state.get_elapsed_us(self.clock) / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"panic\", force=True)\n                        break\n\n            state.pause_time_us += (self.clock.now_us() - state.focus_pause_started_us)\n            state.focus_pause_started_us = None\n            if self.renderer:\n                self.renderer.render(state.get_elapsed_us(self.clock) / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"playing\", force=True)\n        return False\n",
    "file_path": "src/sky_music/orchestration/engine.py",
    "instruction": "Decompose PlaybackEngine.play() by extracting _handle_commands and _process_wait_states.",
    "old_string": "    def get_elapsed_us(\n        self,\n        start_perf: int,\n        pause_time_us: int,\n        manual_pause_started_us: Optional[int],\n        focus_pause_started_us: Optional[int],\n    ) -> int:\n        \"\"\"Compute elapsed playback time in microseconds, accounting for pauses.\"\"\"\n        now_us = self.clock.now_us()\n        elapsed = now_us - start_perf - pause_time_us\n        if manual_pause_started_us is not None:\n            elapsed -= (now_us - manual_pause_started_us)\n        if focus_pause_started_us is not None:\n            elapsed -= (now_us - focus_pause_started_us)\n        return max(0, elapsed)\n"
  },

state.focus_pause_started_us)\n                        state.focus_pause_started_us = None\n                        if self.renderer:\n                            self.renderer.render(_elapsed() / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"playing\", force=True)\n\n                    elapsed_us = _elapsed()\n                    if elapsed_us >= action.at_us:\n                        break\n\n                    remaining_us = action.at_us - elapsed_us\n\n                    # Throttle rendering: limit to max 30 FPS (~33ms) and skip if within 5ms of an action\n                    should_render = False\n                    if self.renderer and remaining_us >= 5_000:\n                        now_render_us = self.clock.now_us()\n                        if now_render_us - last_render_time_us >= 33_000:\n                            should_render = True\n                            last_render_time_us = now_render_us\n\n                    if should_render:\n                        self.renderer.render(elapsed_us / 1_000_000, total_time_seconds, self.song.name, status=\"playing\")\n\n                    target_system_us = state.start_perf + state.pause_time_us + action.at_us\n                    self.precise_sleeper.sleep_step_towards_us(target_system_us, self.clock, self.sleeper, self.sleep_policy.spin_threshold_us)\n\n                # Execute action via extracted method (telemetry + late tracking inside)\n                first_action_executed = True\n                exec_result = self._execute_action(\n                    idx, action,\n                    state.start_perf, state.pause_time_us,\n                    state.manual_pause_started_us, state.focus_pause_started_us,\n                )\n"
  },
  "id": "replace__replace_1780183736030_0"
}

{
