format_info_str(parts, terminal_width - 4)\n        \n        title_bar = f\"╭─ {title} \"\n        title_bar += \"─\" * (terminal_width - len(title_bar) - 1) + \"╮\\n\"\n        info_line = f\"│ {info_str:<{terminal_width - 4}} │\\n\"\n        bottom_bar = \"╰\" + \"─\" * (terminal_width - 2) + \"╯\\n\"\n        \n        return [\n            (\"class:title\", title_bar),\n            (\"class:subtitle\", info_line),\n            (\"class:divider\", bottom_bar),\n        ]\n\n    def build_results_text() -> list[tuple[str, str]]:\n        terminal_width = max(60, min(80, shutil.get_terminal_size((80, 24)).columns))\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            header_str = f\"  #   {'Song Title':<36}    Time   Notes   Risk    Suggested\\n\"\n            divider_str = f\"  ──  {'─' * 36}    ────   ─────   ─────   ───────────\\n\"\n            \n            lines = [\n                (\"class:divider\", header_str),\n                (\"class:divider\", divider_str)\n            ]\n            \n            if not state.filtered_songs:\n                lines.extend([\n                    (\"class:empty\", f\"  {empty_icon} No songs found for \"),\n                    (\"class:match\", search_field.text.strip() or \"empty query\"),\n                    (\"class:empty\", \"\\n\"),\n                    (\"class:muted\", \"    Try another keyword, number, or press Ctrl+R to reload songs.\\n\"),\n                ])\n                return lines\n                \n            r_height, _ = get_layout_heights()\n            max_visible = max(1, r_height - 2)\n            start_idx = max(0, state.selected_index - max_visible // 2)\n            end_idx = min(len(state.filtered_songs), start_idx + max_visible)\n            if end_idx - start_idx < max_visible:\n                start_idx = max(0, end_idx - max_visible)\n                \n            for idx in range(start_idx, end_idx):\n                path = state.filtered_songs[idx]\n                orig_idx = song_indices[path]\n                metadata = get_cached_song_ui_metadata(path)\n                lines.extend(format_song_row(orig_idx, metadata, idx == state.selected_index, search_field.text.strip(), pointer, song_icon))\n                \n            printed_lines = end_idx - start_idx + 2\n            if printed_lines < r_height:\n                lines.append((\"class:unselected\", \"\\n\" * (r_height - printed_lines)))\n            return lines\n            \n        elif state.current_view == \"preview\":\n            if not state.filtered_songs:\n                return [(\"class:empty\", \"No song selected\\n\")]\n            selected_song = state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index]\n            metadata = get_cached_song_ui_metadata(selected_song)\n            \n            import sys\n            timer_status = \"PRECISE (1.0ms resolution active)\" if sys.platform == \"win32\" else \"N/A\"\n            \n            preview_content = [\n                f\"{metadata.name}\",\n                f\"Time {_format_duration(metadata.duration_seconds)} │ Notes {metadata.note_count} │ Polyphony {metadata.max_polyphony} (max {metadata.max_chord_size}-key chords)\",\n                f\"Risk {metadata.risk.upper()} │ Timing Stress Rate: {metadata.timing_stress_rate:.1f}% ({metadata.impossible_repeats}/{metadata.note_count} conflicts)\",\n                f\"Min same-key repeat gap: {metadata.min_same_key_gap_ms:.0f}ms │ Peak density: {metadata.peak_notes_per_second_1s:.1f} notes/s\",\n            ]\n            preview_box = build_box(\"Song\", preview_content, width=terminal_width)\n            \n            suggested_profile = metadata.recommended_profile\n            suggested_tempo = metadata.recommended_tempo_scale\n            \n            # Fetch active timing profile details for context\n            from sky_music.config import load_config\n            user_cfg = load_config()\n            profile_key = state.current_profile.lower().replace(\"-\", \"_\")\n            if profile_key in user_cfg.timing_profiles:\n                p_dict = user_cfg.timing_profiles[profile_key]\n                lead_ms = p_dict.get(\"input_lead_us\", 0) // 1000\n            else:\n                from sky_music.config import DEFAULT_TIMING_PROFILES\n                lead_ms = DEFAULT_TIMING_PROFILES.get(profile_key, {}).get(\"input_lead_us\", 0) // 1000\n            \n            timing_content = [\n                f\"Current Policy:   {state.current_profile} @ {state.current_tempo:.2f}x (input-lead: {lead_ms}ms)\",\n                f\"Suggested Policy: {suggested_profile} @ {suggested_tempo:.2f}x\",\n                f\"Windows Timer:    {timer_status}\"\n            ]\n            timing_box = build_box(\"Timing & System Status\", timing_content, width=terminal_width)\n            \n            return preview_box + timing_box\n            \n        elif state.current_view == \"profile_select\":\n            content = []\n            for name, desc in PROFILES_INFO:\n                is_active = (name == state.current_profile)\n                is_hover = (name == state.temp_profile)\n                \n                bullet = \"●\" if is_active else \"○\"\n                row_str = f\"{bullet} {name:<15}   {desc}\"\n                \n                if is_hover:\n                    content.append([(\"class:selected\", f\" ➜ {row_str}\")])\n                else:\n                    content.append([(\"class:unselected\", f\"   {row_str}\")])\n                    \n            profile_box = build_box(\"Select Timing Profile\", content, width=terminal_width)\n            return profile_box\n            \n        elif state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            content = [\n                f\"Current: {state.temp_tempo:.2f}x\",\n                \"\"\n            ]\n            for val, desc in TEMPO_OPTIONS:\n                is_active = (abs(val - state.current_tempo) < 0.005)\n                is_hover = (abs(val - state.temp_tempo) < 0.005)\n                \n                bullet = \"●\" if is_active else \"○\"\n                row_str = f\"{bullet} {val:.2f}x   {desc}\"\n                \n                if is_hover:\n                    content.append([(\"class:selected\", f\" ➜ {row_str}\")])\n                else:\n                    content.append([(\"class:unselected\", f\"   {row_str}\")])\n                    \n            tempo_box = build_box(\"Tempo Scale\", content, width=terminal_width)\n            return tempo_box\n            \n        elif state.current_view == \"fps_select\":\n            content = [\n                f\"Current: {state.temp_fps if state.temp_fps else 'Auto'}\",\n                \"\"\n            ]\n            for val, desc in FPS_OPTIONS:\n                is_active = (val == state.current_fps)\n                is_hover = (val == state.temp_fps)\n                \n                bullet = \"●\" if is_active else \"○\"\n                val_str = str(val) if val else \"Auto\"\n                row_str = f\"{bullet} {val_str:<4}   {desc}\"\n                \n                if is_hover:\n                    content.append([(\"class:selected\", f\" ➜ {row_str}\")])\n                else:\n                    content.append([(\"class:unselected\", f\"   {row_str}\")])\n                    \n            fps_box = build_box(\"FPS Sync\", content, width=terminal_width)\n            return fps_box\n            \n        elif state.current_view == \"help\":\n            content = [\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  Key       \"), (\"class:detail_label\", \"Description\")],\n                [(\"class:divider\", \"  ────────  ───────────────────────────────────────────────\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  Enter     \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Play selected song in Sky (auto-focuses game window)\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  Space     \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Quick Play (alias for Enter)\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  V         \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Open detailed preview & timing risk warnings\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  P         \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Select Timing Profile (Balanced, Remote-Safe, etc.)\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  T         \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Adjust play speed (tempo scale)\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  F         \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Select FPS target for frame-aware timing\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  D         \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Toggle Dry-Run simulation mode\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  F2        \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Toggle Playback HUD verbosity\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  F3        \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Toggle Telemetry saving (ON / OFF)\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  Ctrl+T    \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Cycle through GUI themes\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  Ctrl+R    \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Reload song list immediately\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  H         \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Close/open this Help Guide\")],\n                [(\"class:key\", \"  Esc       \"), (\"class:detail\", \"Quit current screen or application\")]\n            ]\n            help_box = build_box(\"Keyboard Shortcut Guide\", content, width=terminal_width)\n            return help_box\n            \n        return []\n\n    def build_detail_text() -> list[tuple[str, str]]:\n        terminal_width = max(60, min(80, shutil.get_terminal_size((80, 24)).columns))\n        _, d_height = get_layout_heights()\n        if d_height == 0:\n            return []\n            \n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            if not state.filtered_songs:\n                return build_box(\"Selected\", [\"No song selected\"], width=terminal_width)\n                \n            selected_song = state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index]\n            metadata = get_cached_song_ui_metadata(selected_song)\n            \n            line1 = f\"{metadata.name}\"\n            \n            if d_height >= 5:\n                # 3 lines of content\n                line2 = f\"Polyphony: {metadata.max_polyphony} (max {metadata.max_chord_size}-key chords) │ Min repeat gap: {metadata.min_same_key_gap_ms:.0f}ms\"\n                line3 = f\"Density: avg {metadata.average_notes_per_second:.1f}/s (peak {metadata.peak_notes_per_second_1s:.1f}/s) │ Timing Stress: {metadata.timing_stress_rate:.1f}%\"\n                content = [line1, line2, line3]\n            else:\n                # 2 lines of content\n                line2 = f\"Poly: {metadata.max_polyphony} │ Gap: {metadata.min_same_key_gap_ms:.0f}ms │ Density: {metadata.average_notes_per_second:.1f}/s │ Stress: {metadata.timing_stress_rate:.1f}%\"\n                content = [line1, line2]\n                \n            return build_box(\"Selected\", content, width=terminal_width)\n            \n        elif state.current_view == \"preview\":\n            if not state.filtered_songs:\n                return []\n            selected_song = state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index]\n            metadata = get_cached_song_ui_metadata(selected_song)\n            \n            if metadata.risk == \"low\":\n                return []\n                \n            import textwrap\n            raw_warnings = []\n            for w in metadata.warnings:\n                raw_warnings.extend(textwrap.wrap(w, terminal_width - 4))\n            max_content = max(1, d_height - 2)\n            desc = raw_warnings[:max_content]\n            if len(raw_warnings) > max_content:\n                last_line = desc[-1]\n                if len(last_line) > 3:\n                    desc[-1] = last_line[:-3] + \"...\"\n                else:\n                    desc[-1] = last_line + \"...\"\n                \n            while len(desc) < max_content:\n                desc.append(\"\")\n                \n            return build_box(\"Warnings\", desc, width=terminal_width)\n            \n        return []\n    def build_footer_text() -> list[tuple[str, str]]:\n        terminal_width = max(60, min(80, shutil.get_terminal_size((80, 24)).columns))\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            if not state.filtered_songs:\n                return build_box(\"Footer\", [\"No songs available.\"], width=terminal_width)\n                \n            selected_song = state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index]\n            metadata = get_cached_song_ui_metadata(selected_song)\n            \n            if metadata.risk != \"low\":\n                risk_style = \"fg:#f97316 bold\" if metadata.risk == \"high\" else \"fg:#fbbf24 bold\"\n                rec_profile = metadata.recommended_profile\n                rec_tempo = metadata.recommended_tempo_scale\n                \n                reasons = []\n                if metadata.max_polyphony > 8:\n                    reasons.append(\"high polyphony\")\n                if metadata.min_same_key_gap_ms < 100:\n                    reasons.append(\"close same-key repeats\")\n                if \"dense\" in \"\".join(metadata.warnings).lower():\n                    reasons.append(\"dense clusters\")\n                if not reasons:\n                    reasons.append(\"timing characteristics\")\n                    \n                reason_str = \" and \".join(reasons)\n                box_title = \"Warnings / Actions\"\n                \n                line1 = [\n                    (risk_style, f\"{metadata.risk.upper()} risk: \"),\n                    (\"class:detail\", f\"{reason_str} detected.\")\n                ]\n                actions = [\n                    ActionHint(key=\"Enter\", long=\"play\", short=\"play\", tiny=\"play\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"V\", long=\"view detail\", short=\"view\", tiny=\"view\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"R\", long=\"apply suggested\", short=\"apply\", tiny=\"apply\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"P\", long=\"profile\", short=\"profile\", tiny=\"prof\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"T\", long=\"tempo\", short=\"tempo\", tiny=\"tempo\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"F\", long=\"fps\", short=\"fps\", tiny=\"fps\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"D\", long=\"dry-run\", short=\"dry\", tiny=\"dry\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"F2\", long=\"toggle-hud\", short=\"hud\", tiny=\"hud\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"F3\", long=\"telemetry\", short=\"telem\", tiny=\"tel\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"H\", long=\"help\", short=\"help\", tiny=\"help\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"Esc\", long=\"quit\", short=\"quit\", tiny=\"quit\")\n                ]\n                # Split actions into two balanced rows\n                actions_row1 = actions[:6]\n                actions_row2 = actions[6:]\n                \n                suggested_prefix = [\n                    (\"class:key\", \"Suggested: \"),\n                    (\"class:detail_label\", f\"{rec_profile}\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" │ \")\n                ]\n                prefix_len = len(\"Suggested: \" + rec_profile + \" │ \")\n                line2 = suggested_prefix + format_actions(actions_row1, terminal_width - 4 - prefix_len)\n                line3 = format_actions(actions_row2, terminal_width - 4)\n                \n                return build_box(box_title, [line1, line2, line3], width=terminal_width)\n            else:\n                box_title = \"Footer\"\n                line1 = [(\"class:detail\", \"No timing warnings detected. Balanced profile is suitable.\")]\n                actions = [\n                    ActionHint(key=\"Enter\", long=\"play\", short=\"play\", tiny=\"play\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"V\", long=\"view detail\", short=\"view\", tiny=\"view\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"P\", long=\"profile\", short=\"profile\", tiny=\"prof\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"T\", long=\"tempo\", short=\"tempo\", tiny=\"tempo\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"F\", long=\"fps\", short=\"fps\", tiny=\"fps\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"D\", long=\"dry-run\", short=\"dry\", tiny=\"dry\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"F2\", long=\"toggle-hud\", short=\"hud\", tiny=\"hud\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"F3\", long=\"telemetry\", short=\"telem\", tiny=\"tel\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"H\", long=\"help\", short=\"help\", tiny=\"help\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"^T\", long=\"cycle theme\", short=\"theme\", tiny=\"thm\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"^R\", long=\"reload songs\", short=\"reload\", tiny=\"rel\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"Esc\", long=\"quit\", short=\"quit\", tiny=\"quit\")\n                ]\n                # Split actions into two balanced rows\n                actions_row1 = actions[:6]\n                actions_row2 = actions[6:]\n                \n                line2 = format_actions(actions_row1, terminal_width - 4)\n                line3 = format_actions(actions_row2, terminal_width - 4)\n                \n                return build_box(box_title, [line1, line2, line3], width=terminal_width)\n            \n        elif state.current_view == \"preview\":\n            if not state.filtered_songs:\n                return []\n            selected_song = state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index]\n            metadata = get_cached_song_ui_metadata(selected_song)\n            \n            suggested_matches = (metadata.recommended_profile == state.current_profile and abs(metadata.recommended_tempo_scale - state.current_tempo) < 0.005)\n            \n            if suggested_matches:\n                line1 = [(\"class:detail\", \"No timing conflicts detected.\")]\n                actions = [\n                    ActionHint(key=\"Enter\", long=\"play\", short=\"play\", tiny=\"play\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"P\", long=\"profile\", short=\"profile\", tiny=\"prof\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"T\", long=\"tempo\", short=\"tempo\", tiny=\"tempo\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"F\", long=\"fps\", short=\"fps\", tiny=\"fps\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"D\", long=\"dry-run\", short=\"dry\", tiny=\"dry\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"F2\", long=\"toggle-hud\", short=\"hud\", tiny=\"hud\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"F3\", long=\"toggle-telemetry\", short=\"telem\", tiny=\"telem\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"Esc\", long=\"back\", short=\"back\", tiny=\"back\")\n                ]\n                actions_row1 = actions[:4]\n                actions_row2 = actions[4:]\n                line2 = format_actions(actions_row1, terminal_width - 4)\n                line3 = format_actions(actions_row2, terminal_width - 4)\n                return build_box(\"Footer\", [line1, line2, line3], width=terminal_width)\n            else:\n                if metadata.risk == \"low\":\n                    line1 = [\n                        (\"class:detail\", \"No timing conflicts detected. Suggested balanced at 1.00x.\")\n                    ]\n                else:\n                    risk_style = \"fg:#f97316 bold\" if metadata.risk == \"high\" else \"fg:#fbbf24 bold\"\n                    rec_profile = metadata.recommended_profile\n                    rec_tempo = metadata.recommended_tempo_scale\n                    \n                    reasons = []\n                    if metadata.max_polyphony > 8:\n                        reasons.append(\"high polyphony\")\n                    if metadata.min_same_key_gap_ms < 100:\n                        reasons.append(\"close repeats\")\n                    if \"dense\" in \"\".join(metadata.warnings).lower():\n                        reasons.append(\"dense clusters\")\n                    if not reasons:\n                        reasons.append(\"timing characteristics\")\n                    reason_str = \" and \".join(reasons)\n                    \n                    line1 = [\n                        (risk_style, f\"{metadata.risk.upper()} risk: \"),\n                        (\"class:detail\", f\"{reason_str} detected. Suggested {rec_profile} at {rec_tempo:.2f}x.\")\n                    ]\n                actions = [\n                    ActionHint(key=\"Enter\", long=\"play current\", short=\"play\", tiny=\"play\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"R\", long=\"apply suggested\", short=\"apply\", tiny=\"apply\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"P\", long=\"profile\", short=\"profile\", tiny=\"prof\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"T\", long=\"tempo\", short=\"tempo\", tiny=\"tempo\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"D\", long=\"dry-run\", short=\"dry\", tiny=\"dry\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"F2\", long=\"toggle-hud\", short=\"hud\", tiny=\"hud\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"F3\", long=\"toggle-telemetry\", short=\"telem\", tiny=\"telem\"),\n                    ActionHint(key=\"Esc\", long=\"back\", short=\"back\", tiny=\"back\")\n                ]\n                actions_row1 = actions[:4]\n                actions_row2 = actions[4:]\n                line2 = format_actions(actions_row1, terminal_width - 4)\n                line3 = format_actions(actions_row2, terminal_width - 4)\n                return build_box(\"Footer\", [line1, line2, line3], width=terminal_width)\n        elif state.current_view == \"profile_select\":\n            lines = [\n                [(\"class:detail\", \"Use the keyboard to choose and apply a timing profile:\")],\n                [\n                    (\"class:key\", \"↑/↓\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" choose │ \"),\n                    (\"class:key\", \"Enter\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" apply │ \"),\n                    (\"class:key\", \"Esc\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" cancel\")\n                ],\n                []\n            ]\n            return build_box(\"Navigation\", lines, width=terminal_width)\n\n        elif state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            lines = [\n                [(\"class:detail\", \"Adjust play speed (tempo) preset or fine-tune:\")],\n                [\n                    (\"class:key\", \"↑/↓\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" preset │ \"),\n                    (\"class:key\", \"←/→\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" fine-tune ±0.01x │ \"),\n                    (\"class:key\", \"Enter\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" apply │ \"),\n                    (\"class:key\", \"Esc\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" cancel\")\n                ],\n                []\n            ]\n            return build_box(\"Navigation\", lines, width=terminal_width)\n            \n        elif state.current_view == \"fps_select\":\n            lines = [\n                [(\"class:detail\", \"Select target FPS for timing synchronization:\")],\n                [\n                    (\"class:key\", \"↑/↓\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" choose │ \"),\n                    (\"class:key\", \"Enter\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" apply │ \"),\n                    (\"class:key\", \"Esc\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" cancel\")\n                ],\n                []\n            ]\n            return build_box(\"Navigation\", lines, width=terminal_width)\n            \n        elif state.current_view == \"help\":\n            lines = [\n                [(\"class:detail\", \"Welcome to the Keyboard Shortcut Guide.\")],\n                [\n                    (\"class:key\", \"H\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" or \"),\n                    (\"class:key\", \"Esc\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" to close this guide and return to the song picker.\")\n                ],\n                []\n            ]\n            return build_box(\"Help Navigation\", lines, width=terminal_width)\n\n        return []\n            \n    def filter_songs(query: str) -> list[Path]:\n        is_digit_query = query.isdigit()\n        target_idx = int(query) if is_digit_query else -1\n        matches = []\n        startswith_matches = []\n        contains_matches = []\n\n        for path in state.song_choices:\n            orig_idx = song_indices[path]\n            normalized_name = remove_accents(path.stem).casefold()\n            if is_digit_query and orig_idx == target_idx:\n                matches.append(path)\n            elif normalized_name.startswith(query):\n                startswith_matches.append(path)\n            elif query in normalized_name:\n                contains_matches.append(path)\n\n        return matches + startswith_matches + contains_matches\n\n    def update_ui() -> None:\n        query = remove_accents(search_field.text).casefold().strip()\n        previous_selected_song = state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index] if state.filtered_songs else None\n        state.filtered_songs = filter_songs(query)\n\n        if not state.filtered_songs:\n            state.selected_index = 0\n        elif previous_selected_song in state.filtered_songs:\n            state.selected_index = state.filtered_songs.index(previous_selected_song)\n        else:\n            state.selected_index = min(max(0, state.selected_index), len(state.filtered_songs) - 1)\n\n        header_control.text = build_header_text()\n        results_control.text = build_results_text()\n        detail_control.text = build_detail_text()\n        footer_control.text = build_footer_text()\n\n    search_field.buffer.on_text_changed += lambda _buf: update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"up\")\n    def move_up(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            if state.filtered_songs:\n                state.selected_index = (state.selected_index - 1) % len(state.filtered_songs)\n                update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"profile_select\":\n            profiles = [p[0] for p in PROFILES_INFO]\n            idx = profiles.index(state.temp_profile)\n            state.temp_profile = profiles[(idx - 1) % len(profiles)]\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            presets = [t[0] for t in TEMPO_OPTIONS]\n            idx = min(range(len(presets)), key=lambda i: abs(presets[i] - state.temp_tempo))\n            state.temp_tempo = presets[(idx - 1) % len(presets)]\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"fps_select\":\n            presets = [f[0] for f in FPS_OPTIONS]\n            idx = presets.index(state.temp_fps)\n            state.temp_fps = presets[(idx - 1) % len(presets)]\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"down\")\n    def move_down(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            if state.filtered_songs:\n                state.selected_index = (state.selected_index + 1) % len(state.filtered_songs)\n                update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"profile_select\":\n            profiles = [p[0] for p in PROFILES_INFO]\n            idx = profiles.index(state.temp_profile)\n            state.temp_profile = profiles[(idx + 1) % len(profiles)]\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            presets = [t[0] for t in TEMPO_OPTIONS]\n            idx = min(range(len(presets)), key=lambda i: abs(presets[i] - state.temp_tempo))\n            state.temp_tempo = presets[(idx + 1) % len(presets)]\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"fps_select\":\n            presets = [f[0] for f in FPS_OPTIONS]\n            idx = presets.index(state.temp_fps)\n            state.temp_fps = presets[(idx + 1) % len(presets)]\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"left\")\n    def move_left(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            state.temp_tempo = max(0.50, state.temp_tempo - 0.01)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"right\")\n    def move_right(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            state.temp_tempo = min(2.00, state.temp_tempo + 0.01)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"g\")\n    def move_to_start(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\" and state.filtered_songs:\n            state.selected_index = 0\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"G\")\n    def move_to_end(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\" and state.filtered_songs:\n            state.selected_index = len(state.filtered_songs) - 1\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"f\")\n    def open_fps_select(event):\n        if state.current_view in {\"picker\", \"preview\"}:\n            state.previous_view = state.current_view\n            state.temp_fps = state.current_fps\n            state.current_view = \"fps_select\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"enter\")\n    def accept_selection(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            if state.filtered_songs:\n                safe_exit(event.app, SongPickerResult(\n                    song_path=state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index],\n                    action=\"dry_run\" if state.dry_run_mode else \"play\",\n                    profile_name=state.current_profile,\n                    tempo_scale=state.current_tempo,\n                    fps=state.current_fps,\n                ))\n        elif state.current_view == \"preview\":\n            if state.filtered_songs:\n                safe_exit(event.app, SongPickerResult(\n                    song_path=state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index],\n                    action=\"dry_run\" if state.dry_run_mode else \"play\",\n                    profile_name=state.current_profile,\n                    tempo_scale=state.current_tempo,\n                    fps=state.current_fps,\n                ))\n        elif state.current_view == \"profile_select\":\n            state.current_profile = state.temp_profile\n            state.current_view = state.previous_view\n            try:\n                from sky_music.config import load_config, save_config\n                cfg = load_config()\n                cfg.default_timing_profile = state.current_profile\n                save_config(cfg)\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n            if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n                event.app.layout.focus(search_field)\n            else:\n                event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            state.current_tempo = state.temp_tempo\n            state.current_view = state.previous_view\n            try:\n                from sky_music.config import load_config, save_config\n                cfg = load_config()\n                cfg.default_tempo_scale = state.current_tempo\n                save_config(cfg)\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n            if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n                event.app.layout.focus(search_field)\n            else:\n                event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"fps_select\":\n            state.current_fps = state.temp_fps\n            state.current_view = state.previous_view\n            try:\n                from sky_music.config import load_config, save_config\n                cfg = load_config()\n                if state.current_fps is not None:\n                    cfg.game_fps = state.current_fps\n                save_config(cfg)\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n            if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n                event.app.layout.focus(search_field)\n            else:\n                event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"v\")\n    def open_preview(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\" and state.filtered_songs:\n            state.current_view = \"preview\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"space\")\n    def quick_play(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\" and state.filtered_songs:\n            safe_exit(event.app, SongPickerResult(\n                song_path=state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index],\n                action=\"dry_run\" if state.dry_run_mode else \"play\",\n                profile_name=state.current_profile,\n                tempo_scale=state.current_tempo,\n                fps=state.current_fps,\n            ))\n\n    @kb.add(\"d\")\n    def toggle_dry_run(event):\n        state.dry_run_mode = not state.dry_run_mode\n        update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"p\")\n    def open_profile_select(event):\n        if state.current_view in {\"picker\", \"preview\"}:\n            state.previous_view = state.current_view\n            state.temp_profile = state.current_profile\n            state.current_view = \"profile_select\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"t\")\n    def open_tempo_select(event):\n        if state.current_view in {\"picker\", \"preview\"}:\n            state.previous_view = state.current_view\n            state.temp_tempo = state.current_tempo\n            state.current_view = \"tempo_select\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"r\")\n    def apply_recommended(event):\n        if state.filtered_songs and state.current_view in {\"picker\", \"preview\"}:\n            metadata = get_cached_song_ui_metadata(state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index])\n            safe_profiles = [p[0] for p in PROFILES_INFO]\n            state.current_profile = metadata.recommended_profile if metadata.recommended_profile in safe_profiles else \"balanced\"\n            state.current_tempo = metadata.recommended_tempo_scale\n            state.risk_hint = f\"Applied suggested: {state.current_profile} {state.current_tempo:.2f}x\"\n            try:\n                from sky_music.config import load_config, save_config\n                cfg = load_config()\n                cfg.default_timing_profile = state.current_profile\n                cfg.default_tempo_scale = state.current_tempo\n                save_config(cfg)\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"escape\")\n    def cancel_or_back(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            safe_exit(event.app, None)\n        elif state.current_view == \"preview\":\n            state.current_view = \"picker\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(search_field)\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view in {\"profile_select\", \"tempo_select\", \"help\"}:\n            state.current_view = state.previous_view\n            if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n                event.app.layout.focus(search_field)\n            else:\n                event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"h\")\n    def toggle_help_view(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            state.previous_view = state.current_view\n            state.current_view = \"help\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"help\":\n            state.current_view = \"picker\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(search_field)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"c-c\")\n    def cancel(event):\n        safe_exit(event.app, None)\n\n    @kb.add(\"c-r\")\n    def reload_songs(event):\n        clear_metadata_cache()\n        state.song_choices = get_song_choices(force_refresh=True)\n        song_indices = {path: idx for idx, path in enumerate(state.song_choices, start=1)}\n        state.selected_index = 0\n        state.filtered_songs = list(state.song_choices)\n        search_field.text = \"\"\n        update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"c-t\")\n    def cycle_theme(event):\n        nonlocal current_theme_name, pointer, song_icon, empty_icon\n        themes_list = list(THEME_PRESETS.keys())\n        current_idx = themes_list.index(current_theme_name)\n        next_idx = (current_idx + 1) % len(themes_list)\n        current_theme_name = themes_list[next_idx]\n\n        _, new_theme = get_theme(current_theme_name)\n        pointer = new_theme[\"pointer\"]\n        song_icon = new_theme[\"song_icon\"]\n        empty_icon = new_theme[\"empty_icon\"]\n\n        event.app.style = Style.from_dict(new_theme[\"style\"])\n\n        global ACTIVE_THEME\n        ACTIVE_THEME = current_theme_name\n        save_theme(current_theme_name)\n\n        update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"f2\")\n    def toggle_verbose_hud(event):\n        nonlocal verbose_hud_mode\n        verbose_hud_mode = not verbose_hud_mode\n        from sky_music.config import load_config, save_config\n        cfg = load_config()\n        cfg.verbose_hud = verbose_hud_mode\n        save_config(cfg)\n        update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"f3\")\n    def toggle_telemetry(event):\n        nonlocal telemetry_mode\n        telemetry_mode = not telemetry_mode\n        from sky_music.config import load_config, save_config\n        cfg = load_config()\n        cfg.telemetry_enabled_by_default = telemetry_mode\n        save_config(cfg)\n        update_ui()\n",
    "file_path": "src/sky_music/ui/picker.py",
    "instruction": "Correctly update get_layout_heights to handle fps_select view by adding a block before help view.",
    "allow_multiple": false
  }
}

],\n                []\n            ]\n            return build_box(\"Navigation\", lines, width=terminal_width)\n\n        elif state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            lines = [\n   return build_box(\"Navigation\", lines, width=terminal_width)\n            \n        elif state.current_view == \"fps_select\":\n            lines = [\n                [(\"class:detail\", \"Select target FPS for timing synchronization:\")],\n                [\n                    (\"class:key\", \"↑/↓\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" choose │ \"),\n                    (\"class:key\", \"Enter\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" apply │ \"),\n                    (\"class:key\", \"Esc\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" cancel\")\n                ],\n                []\n            ]\n            return build_box(\"Navigation\", lines, width=terminal_width)\n            \n        elif state.current_view == \"help\":\n            lines = [\n                [(\"class:detail\", \"Welcome to the Keyboard Shortcut Guide.\")],\n                [\n                    (\"class:key\", \"H\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" or \"),\n                    (\"class:key\", \"Esc\"),\n                    (\"class:footer\", \" to close this guide and return to the song picker.\")\n                ],\n                []\n            ]\n            return build_box(\"Help Navigation\", lines, width=terminal_width)\n\n        return []\n            \n    def filter_songs(query: str) -> list[Path]:\n        is_digit_query = query.isdigit()\n        target_idx = int(query) if is_digit_query else -1\n        matches = []\n        startswith_matches = []\n        contains_matches = []\n\n        for path in state.song_choices:\n            orig_idx = song_indices[path]\n            normalized_name = remove_accents(path.stem).casefold()\n            if is_digit_query and orig_idx == target_idx:\n                matches.append(path)\n            elif normalized_name.startswith(query):\n                startswith_matches.append(path)\n            elif query in normalized_name:\n                contains_matches.append(path)\n\n        return matches + startswith_matches + contains_matches\n\n    def update_ui() -> None:\n        query = remove_accents(search_field.text).casefold().strip()\n        previous_selected_song = state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index] if state.filtered_songs else None\n        state.filtered_songs = filter_songs(query)\n\n        if not state.filtered_songs:\n            state.selected_index = 0\n        elif previous_selected_song in state.filtered_songs:\n            state.selected_index = state.filtered_songs.index(previous_selected_song)\n        else:\n            state.selected_index = min(max(0, state.selected_index), len(state.filtered_songs) - 1)\n\n        header_control.text = build_header_text()\n        results_control.text = build_results_text()\n        detail_control.text = build_detail_text()\n        footer_control.text = build_footer_text()\n\n    search_field.buffer.on_text_changed += lambda _buf: update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"up\")\n    def move_up(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            if state.filtered_songs:\n                state.selected_index = (state.selected_index - 1) % len(state.filtered_songs)\n                update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"profile_select\":\n            profiles = [p[0] for p in PROFILES_INFO]\n            idx = profiles.index(state.temp_profile)\n            state.temp_profile = profiles[(idx - 1) % len(profiles)]\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            presets = [t[0] for t in TEMPO_OPTIONS]\n            idx = min(range(len(presets)), key=lambda i: abs(presets[i] - state.temp_tempo))\n            state.temp_tempo = presets[(idx - 1) % len(presets)]\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"fps_select\":\n            presets = [f[0] for f in FPS_OPTIONS]\n            idx = presets.index(state.temp_fps)\n            state.temp_fps = presets[(idx - 1) % len(presets)]\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"down\")\n    def move_down(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            if state.filtered_songs:\n                state.selected_index = (state.selected_index + 1) % len(state.filtered_songs)\n                update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"profile_select\":\n            profiles = [p[0] for p in PROFILES_INFO]\n            idx = profiles.index(state.temp_profile)\n            state.temp_profile = profiles[(idx + 1) % len(profiles)]\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            presets = [t[0] for t in TEMPO_OPTIONS]\n            idx = min(range(len(presets)), key=lambda i: abs(presets[i] - state.temp_tempo))\n            state.temp_tempo = presets[(idx + 1) % len(presets)]\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"fps_select\":\n            presets = [f[0] for f in FPS_OPTIONS]\n            idx = presets.index(state.temp_fps)\n            state.temp_fps = presets[(idx + 1) % len(presets)]\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"left\")\n    def move_left(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            state.temp_tempo = max(0.50, state.temp_tempo - 0.01)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"right\")\n    def move_right(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            state.temp_tempo = min(2.00, state.temp_tempo + 0.01)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"g\")\n    def move_to_start(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\" and state.filtered_songs:\n            state.selected_index = 0\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"G\")\n    def move_to_end(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\" and state.filtered_songs:\n            state.selected_index = len(state.filtered_songs) - 1\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"f\")\n    def open_fps_select(event):\n        if state.current_view in {\"picker\", \"preview\"}:\n            state.previous_view = state.current_view\n            state.temp_fps = state.current_fps\n            state.current_view = \"fps_select\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"enter\")\n    def accept_selection(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            if state.filtered_songs:\n                safe_exit(event.app, SongPickerResult(\n                    song_path=state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index],\n                    action=\"dry_run\" if state.dry_run_mode else \"play\",\n                    profile_name=state.current_profile,\n                    tempo_scale=state.current_tempo,\n                    fps=state.current_fps,\n                ))\n        elif state.current_view == \"preview\":\n            if state.filtered_songs:\n                safe_exit(event.app, SongPickerResult(\n                    song_path=state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index],\n                    action=\"dry_run\" if state.dry_run_mode else \"play\",\n                    profile_name=state.current_profile,\n                    tempo_scale=state.current_tempo,\n                    fps=state.current_fps,\n                ))\n        elif state.current_view == \"profile_select\":\n            state.current_profile = state.temp_profile\n            state.current_view = state.previous_view\n            try:\n                from sky_music.config import load_config, save_config\n                cfg = load_config()\n                cfg.default_timing_profile = state.current_profile\n                save_config(cfg)\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n            if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n                event.app.layout.focus(search_field)\n            else:\n                event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"tempo_select\":\n            state.current_tempo = state.temp_tempo\n            state.current_view = state.previous_view\n            try:\n                from sky_music.config import load_config, save_config\n                cfg = load_config()\n                cfg.default_tempo_scale = state.current_tempo\n                save_config(cfg)\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n            if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n                event.app.layout.focus(search_field)\n            else:\n                event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"fps_select\":\n = load_config()\n                if state.current_fps is not None:\n                    cfg.game_fps = state.current_fps\n                save_config(cfg)\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n            if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n                event.app.layout.focus(search_field)\n            else:\n                event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"v\")\n    def open_preview(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\" and state.filtered_songs:\n            state.current_view = \"preview\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"space\")\n    def quick_play(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\" and state.filtered_songs:\n profile_name=state.current_profile,\n                tempo_scale=state.current_tempo,\n                fps=state.current_fps,\n            ))\n\n    @kb.add(\"d\")\n    def toggle_dry_run(event):\n        state.dry_run_mode = not state.dry_run_mode\n        update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"p\")\n    def open_profile_select(event):\n        if state.current_view in {\"picker\", \"preview\"}:\n            state.previous_view = state.current_view\n            state.temp_profile = state.current_profile\n            state.current_view = \"profile_select\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"t\")\n    def open_tempo_select(event):\n        if state.current_view in {\"picker\", \"preview\"}:\n            state.previous_view = state.current_view\n            state.temp_tempo = state.current_tempo\n            state.current_view = \"tempo_select\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"r\")\n    def apply_recommended(event):\n        if state.filtered_songs and state.current_view in {\"picker\", \"preview\"}:\n            metadata = get_cached_song_ui_metadata(state.filtered_songs[state.selected_index])\n            safe_profiles = [p[0] for p in PROFILES_INFO]\n            state.current_profile = metadata.recommended_profile if metadata.recommended_profile in safe_profiles else \"balanced\"\n            state.current_tempo = metadata.recommended_tempo_scale\n            state.risk_hint = f\"Applied suggested: {state.current_profile} {state.current_tempo:.2f}x\"\n            try:\n                from sky_music.config import load_config, save_config\n                cfg = load_config()\n                cfg.default_timing_profile = state.current_profile\n                cfg.default_tempo_scale = state.current_tempo\n                save_config(cfg)\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"escape\")\n    def cancel_or_back(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            safe_exit(event.app, None)\n        elif state.current_view == \"preview\":\n            state.current_view = \"picker\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(search_field)\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view in {\"profile_select\", \"tempo_select\", \"help\"}:\n            state.current_view = state.previous_view\n            if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n                event.app.layout.focus(search_field)\n            else:\n                event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"h\")\n    def toggle_help_view(event):\n        if state.current_view == \"picker\":\n            state.previous_view = state.current_view\n            state.current_view = \"help\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(results_window)\n            update_ui()\n        elif state.current_view == \"help\":\n            state.current_view = \"picker\"\n            event.app.layout.focus(search_field)\n            update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"c-c\")\n    def cancel(event):\n        safe_exit(event.app, None)\n\n    @kb.add(\"c-r\")\n    def reload_songs(event):\n        clear_metadata_cache()\n        state.song_choices = get_song_choices(force_refresh=True)\n        song_indices = {path: idx for idx, path in enumerate(state.song_choices, start=1)}\n        state.selected_index = 0\n        state.filtered_songs = list(state.song_choices)\n        search_field.text = \"\"\n        update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"c-t\")\n    def cycle_theme(event):\n        nonlocal current_theme_name, pointer, song_icon, empty_icon\n        themes_list = list(THEME_PRESETS.keys())\n        current_idx = themes_list.index(current_theme_name)\n        next_idx = (current_idx + 1) % len(themes_list)\n        current_theme_name = themes_list[next_idx]\n\n        _, new_theme = get_theme(current_theme_name)\n        pointer = new_theme[\"pointer\"]\n        song_icon = new_theme[\"song_icon\"]\n        empty_icon = new_theme[\"empty_icon\"]\n\n        event.app.style = Style.from_dict(new_theme[\"style\"])\n\n        global ACTIVE_THEME\n        ACTIVE_THEME = current_theme_name\n        save_theme(current_theme_name)\n\n        update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"f2\")\n    def toggle_verbose_hud(event):\n        nonlocal verbose_hud_mode\n        verbose_hud_mode = not verbose_hud_mode\n        from sky_music.config import load_config, save_config\n        cfg = load_config()\n        cfg.verbose_hud = verbose_hud_mode\n        save_config(cfg)\n        update_ui()\n\n    @kb.add(\"f3\")\n    def toggle_telemetry(event):\n        nonlocal telemetry_mode\n        telemetry_mode = not telemetry_mode\n        from sky_music.config import load_config, save_config\n        cfg = load_config()\n        cfg.telemetry_enabled_by_default = telemetry_mode\n        save_config(cfg)\n        update_ui()\n\n    # Initial UI setup\n    update_ui()\n\n    app = Application(\n        layout=layout,\n        key_bindings=kb,\n        style=style,\n        full_screen=False,\n        mouse_support=False,\n    )\n\n    return app.run()\n",
    "file_path": "src/sky_music/ui/picker.py"
  }
}

---

## MODEL ✨

Tôi đã khôi phục lại tệp `src/sky_music/ui/picker.py` bằng cách ghi lại toàn bộ logic chức năng, bao gồm các cấu trúc cần thiết cho tính năng chọn FPS.

Hiện tại, `picker.py` đã có:
1.  Định nghĩa `PickerState` class.
2.  `SongPickerResult` dataclass đã cập nhật trường `fps`.
3.  Logic chọn FPS trong hàm `choose_song_interactively` (bao gồm `initial_fps` và `state.temp_fps`).
4.  Giao diện `fps_select` trong `get_layout_heights` và `build_results_text`.
5.  Hotkey `f` để mở menu chọn FPS.

**Bước tiếp theo:**
Để hoàn thiện tính năng này và đảm bảo hệ thống nhận FPS từ picker, chúng ta cần cập nhật `src/main.py` để lấy `result.fps` từ hàm `choose_song_interactively` và truyền nó vào `PlaybackEngine`.

Bạn có muốn tôi tiến hành cập nhật `src/main.py` ngay không?

    "file_path": "src/main.py",
    "new_string": "    engine = PlaybackEngine(\n        song=song,\n        actions=actions,\n        backend=backend,\n        controls=controls,\n        renderer=renderer,\n        telemetry_enabled=TELEMETRY_CSV_ENABLED or PLAYBACK_DEBUG or force_dry_run,\n        require_focus=not is_dry_run,\n        profile_name=current_profile,\n        tempo_scale=current_tempo,\n        fps=picker_result.fps,\n        sleep_policy=active_sleep_policy,\n        focus_restore_grace_us=active_policy.focus_restore_grace_us\n    )",
    "old_string": "    engine = PlaybackEngine(\n        song=song,\n        actions=actions,\n        backend=backend,\n        controls=controls,\n        renderer=renderer,\n        telemetry_enabled=TELEMETRY_CSV_ENABLED or PLAYBACK_DEBUG or force_dry_run,\n        require_focus=not is_dry_run,\n        profile_name=current_profile,\n        tempo_scale=current_tempo,\n        sleep_policy=active_sleep_policy,\n        focus_restore_grace_us=active_policy.focus_restore_grace_us\n    )",
    "allow_multiple": false,
    "instruction": "Pass fps from picker result to PlaybackEngine in main.py."
  }
}
```

current_tempo = new_tempo\n            \n            violations = validate_key_actions(actions)\n            if violations:\n                print(\"\\n[Warning] Schedule Invariant Violations detected after tempo change:\")\n                for violation in violations:\n                    print(f\"  - [{violation.code}] {violation.message}\")\n                if not check_and_abort_violations(violations, is_dry_run):\n                    return PLAYBACK_QUIT\n\n    # Preflight check and window readiness\n    if not _mini_preflight(is_dry_run, profile=current_profile, tempo=current_tempo, controls=controls):\n        return PLAYBACK_QUIT\n\n    # Check window/readiness only if we are NOT running dry-run mode\n    if not is_dry_run:\n        countdown_before_playback(countdown_seconds)\n    else:\n        print(f\"[simulation] DRY-RUN enabled. Simulating playback of {song.name}...\")\n\n    backend = DryRunBackend() if is_dry_run else WinSendInputBackend()\n    renderer = ProgressRenderer(\n        controls,\n        verbose=VERBOSE_HUD,\n        profile_name=current_profile,\n        tempo_scale=current_tempo,\n    )\n    \n    engine = PlaybackEngine(\n        song=song,\n        actions=actions,\n        backend=backend,\n        controls=controls,\n        renderer=renderer,\n        telemetry_enabled=TELEMETRY_CSV_ENABLED or PLAYBACK_DEBUG or force_dry_run,\n        require_focus=not is_dry_run,\n        profile_name=current_profile,\n        tempo_scale=current_tempo,\n        fps=picker_result.fps,\n        sleep_policy=active_sleep_policy,\n        focus_restore_grace_us=active_policy.focus_restore_grace_us\n    )\n    result = engine.play()\n    # P3: post-run summary\n    _print_post_run_report(engine, current_profile, current_tempo)\n    return result\n\n\ndef build_arg_parser():\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(\n        description=\"Play Sky song files from the terminal.\",\n    )\n\n    # ── Song Selection ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    sel = parser.add_argument_group(\"Song selection\")\n    sel.add_argument(\n        \"--song\",\n        help=\"play a song by number, exact name, partial name, or file path\",\n    )\n    sel.add_argument(\n        \"--list\",\n        action=\"store_true\",\n        help=\"list available songs and exit\",\n    )\n    sel.add_argument(\n        \"--songs-dir\",\n        type=Path,\n        default=SONG_DIR,\n        help=\"folder containing .json/.skysheet files\",\n    )\n    sel.add_argument(\n        \"--countdown\",\n        type=int,\n        default=3,\n        help=\"seconds to wait before playback starts (default: 3)\",\n    )\n    sel.add_argument(\n        \"--repeat\",\n        type=int,\n        default=1,\n    )\n    # ── Playback Timing ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    timing = parser.add_argument_group(\"Playback timing\")\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--timing-profile\",\n        choices=[\n            \"fast\", \"balanced\", \"conservative\", \"local-precise\", \"remote-safe\", \"dense-safe\",\n            \"balanced-60fps\", \"balanced-120fps\", \"low-fps-30\"\n        ],\n        default=\"balanced\",\n        help=(\n            \"Timing profile: \"\n            \"local-precise (low latency), \"\n            \"remote-safe (listener quality), \"\n            \"dense-safe (many chords/repeats), \"\n            \"fast (experimental), \"\n            \"balanced (default), \"\n            \"conservative (safe/slower), \"\n            \"balanced-60fps (optimal 60 FPS), \"\n            \"balanced-120fps (optimal 120 FPS), \"\n            \"low-fps-30 (optimal 30 FPS/emulator)\"\n        ),\n    )\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--tempo-scale\",\n        type=float,\n        default=1.0,\n        help=\"Scale playback tempo: 1.2 = 20%% faster, 0.8 = 20%% slower (default: 1.0)\",\n    )\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--hold-ms\",\n        type=int,\n        help=\"Override key hold duration in ms (overrides profile)\",\n    )\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--min-hold-ms\",\n        type=int,\n        help=\"Override minimum key hold duration in ms (overrides profile)\",\n    )\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--min-scheduled-hold-ms\",\n        type=int,\n        help=\"Override minimum scheduled hold duration in ms (overrides profile)\",\n    )\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--release-gap-ms\",\n        type=int,\n        help=\"Override release gap in ms (overrides profile)\",\n    )\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--repeat-release-gap-ms\",\n        type=int,\n        help=\"Override same-key repeat gap in ms (overrides profile)\",\n    )\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--input-lead-ms\",\n        type=int,\n        help=\"Override input lead duration in ms (overrides profile)\",\n    )\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--chord-merge-window-ms\",\n        type=int,\n        help=\"Override chord merge tolerance window in ms (overrides profile)\",\n    )\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--spin-threshold-us\",\n        type=int,\n        help=\"Override CPU spin threshold in microseconds (precise=800, balanced=500, battery_safe=200/0) (overrides profile)\",\n    )\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--focus-restore-grace-ms\",\n        type=int,\n        help=\"Override focus restoration grace period in ms (precise=50, balanced=100, remote/safe=150-200) (overrides profile)\",\n    )\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--scan-code-mode\",\n        choices=[\"physical\", \"mapped\"],\n        default=\"physical\",\n        help=\"physical = fixed QWERTY scan codes (default), mapped = OS keyboard layout\",\n    )\n    timing.add_argument(\n        \"--same-key-conflict-policy\",\n        choices=[\"degraded\", \"strict\"],\n        help=\"degraded = warn and compress timing (default), strict = reject and abort playback\",\n    )\n\n    # ── Runtime Controls ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    ctrl = parser.add_argument_group(\"Runtime controls (hotkeys during playback)\")\n    ctrl.add_argument(\n        \"--pause-key\",\n        default=\"f8\",\n        help=\"pause/resume hotkey, e.g. f8 or ctrl+p (default: f8)\",\n    )\n    ctrl.add_argument(\n        \"--skip-key\",\n        default=\"f9\",\n        help=\"skip current song hotkey (default: f9)\",\n    )\n    ctrl.add_argument(\n        \"--quit-key\",\n        default=\"f10\",\n        help=\"quit playback hotkey (default: f10; Esc not recommended — game may intercept it)\",\n    )\n    ctrl.add_argument(\n        \"--refocus-key\",\n        default=\"f6\",\n        help=\"bring Sky window to foreground hotkey (default: f6)\",\n    )\n    ctrl.add_argument(\n        \"--panic-key\",\n        default=\"ctrl+alt+backspace\",\n        help=\"emergency release all keys without stopping playback (default: ctrl+alt+backspace)\",\n    )\n    ctrl.add_argument(\n        \"--disable-hotkeys\",\n        action=\"store_true\",\n        help=\"disable all runtime hotkeys; use Ctrl+C only\",\n    )\n    ctrl.add_argument(\n        \"--allow-note-hotkeys\",\n        action=\"store_true\",\n        help=\"allow hotkeys that overlap with note keys (not recommended)\",\n    )\n\n    # ── Safety & Diagnostics ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    diag = parser.add_argument_group(\"Safety and diagnostics\")\n    diag.add_argument(\n        \"--doctor\",\n        action=\"store_true\",\n        help=\"run full readiness check (Sky window, timers, layout, key conflicts)\",\n    )\n    diag.add_argument(\n        \"--doctor-timing\",\n        action=\"store_true\",\n        help=\"check high-precision multimedia timer subsystem only\",\n    )\n    diag.add_argument(\n        \"--doctor-input\",\n        action=\"store_true\",\n        help=\"check keyboard layout mapping and physically held note keys only\",\n    )\n    diag.add_argument(\n        \"--sky-process-names\",\n        default=\"Sky.exe,Sky Children of the Light.exe\",\n        help=\"comma-separated Sky executable names to match (default: Sky.exe,...)\",\n    )\n    diag.add_argument(\n        \"--allow-title-fallback\",\n        action=\"store_true\",\n        help=\"allow window title matching when process verification fails\",\n    )\n\n    # ── Telemetry ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    telem = parser.add_argument_group(\"Telemetry\")\n    telem.add_argument(\n        \"--debug-csv\",\n        action=\"store_true\",\n        help=\"write per-event timing CSV + summary JSON to logs/ after each playback\",\n    )\n    telem.add_argument(\n        \"--debug-playback\",\n        action=\"store_true\",\n        help=\"write verbose playback debug log to logs/\",\n    )\n    telem.add_argument(\n        \"--dry-run\",\n        action=\"store_true\",\n        help=\"simulate playback in memory without sending any keystrokes (timing diagnosis)\",\n    )\n    telem.add_argument(\n        \"--inspect-telemetry\",\n        help=\"read and summarize telemetry from a .summary.json file or logs/ directory and exit\",\n    )\n\n    # ── Display ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    disp = parser.add_argument_group(\"Display\")\n    disp.add_argument(\n        \"--theme\",\n        choices=[\"aurora\", \"minimalist\", \"slate\", \"cyberpunk\", \"classic\"],\n        default=None,\n        help=\"song picker TUI theme (default: saved or aurora)\",\n    )\n    disp.add_argument(\n        \"--no-clear\",\n        action=\"store_true\",\n        help=\"do not clear the terminal between songs\",\n    )\n    disp.add_argument(\n        \"--verbose-hud\",\n        action=\"store_true\",\n        help=\"show detailed live timing/backend stats during playback (2-line HUD)\",\n    )\n\n    return parser\n\ndef configure_from_args(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:\n    global PLAYBACK_DEBUG, DEBUG_LOG_PATH, CURRENT_SCAN_CODE_MODE, TIMING_POLICY, SLEEP_POLICY, TELEMETRY_CSV_ENABLED, DRY_RUN_MODE, TEMPO_SCALE, TIMING_PROFILE_NAME, VERBOSE_HUD\n    from sky_music.platform.win32 import inputs\n    from sky_music.ui import picker as songs\n    from sky_music.domain.scheduler_types import TimingPolicy\n    from sky_music.config import load_config\n    from sky_music.infrastructure.timing import SleepPolicy\n\n    CURRENT_SCAN_CODE_MODE = args.scan_code_mode\n    songs.SONG_DIR = args.songs_dir\n    PLAYBACK_DEBUG = args.debug_playback\n    inputs.PLAYBACK_DEBUG = args.debug_playback\n    TELEMETRY_CSV_ENABLED = args.debug_csv\n    DRY_RUN_MODE = args.dry_run\n    TEMPO_SCALE = args.tempo_scale\n    if TEMPO_SCALE <= 0:\n        raise ValueError(\"tempo_scale must be > 0\")\n    TIMING_PROFILE_NAME = args.timing_profile\n    VERBOSE_HUD = args.verbose_hud\n\n    if PLAYBACK_DEBUG:\n        init_debug_log()\n\n    # Determine base TimingPolicy from persistent profile in config or fallbacks\n    profile = args.timing_profile.lower().replace(\"-\", \"_\")\n    user_cfg = load_config()\n    \n    if profile in user_cfg.timing_profiles:\n        p_dict = user_cfg.timing_profiles[profile]\n    else:\n        fallback_profile = user_cfg.default_timing_profile.lower().replace(\"-\", \"_\")\n        p_dict = user_cfg.timing_profiles.get(fallback_profile, user_cfg.timing_profiles[\"balanced\"])\n        \n    base_spin_threshold_us = p_dict.get(\"spin_threshold_us\", 500)\n    policy = TimingPolicy(\n        hold_us=p_dict.get(\"hold_us\", 24_000),\n        min_hold_us=p_dict.get(\"min_hold_us\", 12_000),\n        release_gap_us=p_dict.get(\"release_gap_us\", 3_000),\n        repeat_release_gap_us=p_dict.get(\"repeat_release_gap_us\", 2_000),\n        min_scheduled_hold_us=p_dict.get(\"min_scheduled_hold_us\", 500),\n        input_lead_us=p_dict.get(\"input_lead_us\", 0),\n        chord_merge_window_us=p_dict.get(\"chord_merge_window_us\", 0),\n        focus_restore_grace_us=p_dict.get(\"focus_restore_grace_us\", 100_000),\n        same_key_conflict_policy=p_dict.get(\"same_key_conflict_policy\", \"degraded\")\n    )\n\n    # Perform overrides from arguments\n    hold_us = args.hold_ms * 1000 if args.hold_ms is not None else policy.hold_us\n    min_hold_us = args.min_hold_ms * 1000 if args.min_hold_ms is not None else policy.min_hold_us\n    release_gap_us = args.release_gap_ms * 1000 if args.release_gap_ms is not None else policy.release_gap_us\n    repeat_release_gap_us = args.repeat_release_gap_ms * 1000 if args.repeat_release_gap_ms is not None else policy.repeat_release_gap_us\n    input_lead_us = getattr(args, \"input_lead_ms\", None)\n    if input_lead_us is not None:\n        input_lead_us = input_lead_us * 1000\n    else:\n        input_lead_us = policy.input_lead_us\n        \n    chord_merge_window_us = getattr(args, \"chord_merge_window_ms\", None)\n    if chord_merge_window_us is not None:\n        chord_merge_window_us = chord_merge_window_us * 1000\n    else:\n        chord_merge_window_us = policy.chord_merge_window_us\n\n    spin_threshold_us = getattr(args, \"spin_threshold_us\", None)\n    if spin_threshold_us is None:\n        spin_threshold_us = base_spin_threshold_us\n\n    focus_restore_grace_us = getattr(args, \"focus_restore_grace_ms\", None)\n    if focus_restore_grace_us is not None:\n        focus_restore_grace_us = focus_restore_grace_us * 1000\n    else:\n        focus_restore_grace_us = policy.focus_restore_grace_us\n    \n    min_scheduled_hold_us = getattr(args, \"min_scheduled_hold_ms\", None)\n    if min_scheduled_hold_us is not None:\n        min_scheduled_hold_us = min_scheduled_hold_us * 1000\n    else:\n        min_scheduled_hold_us = policy.min_scheduled_hold_us\n\n    same_key_conflict_policy = args.same_key_conflict_policy if args.same_key_conflict_policy is not None else policy.same_key_conflict_policy\n\n    TIMING_POLICY = TimingPolicy(\n        hold_us=hold_us,\n        min_hold_us=min_hold_us,\n        release_gap_us=release_gap_us,\n        repeat_release_gap_us=repeat_release_gap_us,\n        min_scheduled_hold_us=min_scheduled_hold_us,\n        input_lead_us=input_lead_us,\n        chord_merge_window_us=chord_merge_window_us,\n        focus_restore_grace_us=focus_restore_grace_us,\n        same_key_conflict_policy=same_key_conflict_policy\n    )\n\n    SLEEP_POLICY = SleepPolicy(\n        spin_threshold_us=spin_threshold_us,\n        poll_s=0.025\n    )\n\n    if args.sky_process_names:\n        inputs.EXPECTED_PROCESS_NAMES = {\n            name.strip()\n            for name in args.sky_process_names.split(\",\")\n            if name.strip()\n        }\n\n    inputs.ALLOW_TITLE_FALLBACK = bool(args.allow_title_fallback)\n    if args.theme is not None:\n        songs.ACTIVE_THEME = args.theme\n        songs.save_theme(args.theme)\n\ndef build_playback_controls(args: argparse.Namespace) -> PlaybackControls:\n    if args.disable_hotkeys:\n        return PlaybackControls(\n            pause=parse_hotkey(args.pause_key),\n            skip=parse_hotkey(args.skip_key),\n            quit=parse_hotkey(args.quit_key),\n            refocus=parse_hotkey(args.refocus_key),\n            panic=parse_hotkey(args.panic_key),\n            enabled=False,\n        )\n\n    controls = PlaybackControls(\n        pause=parse_hotkey(args.pause_key),\n        skip=parse_hotkey(args.skip_key),\n        quit=parse_hotkey(args.quit_key),\n        refocus=parse_hotkey(args.refocus_key),\n        panic=parse_hotkey(args.panic_key),\n    )\n\n    conflicting = [\n        (\"pause\", controls.pause),\n        (\"skip\", controls.skip),\n        (\"quit\", controls.quit),\n        (\"refocus\", controls.refocus),\n        # panic always has modifiers, no need to check note conflicts\n    ]\n    unsafe = [f\"{name}={hotkey.display}\" for name, hotkey in conflicting if hotkey_conflicts_with_note_keys(hotkey)]\n    if unsafe and not args.allow_note_hotkeys:\n        raise ValueError(\n            \"Hotkey overlaps with note keys: \"\n            + \", \".join(unsafe)\n            + \". Use Ctrl/Alt/Shift, a function key, or pass --allow-note-hotkeys if you accept the risk.\"\n        )\n    return controls\n\ndef prompt_song_selection(\n    profile: str = \"balanced\",\n    tempo: float = 1.0,\n    dry_run: bool = False,\n) -> \"SongPickerResult | None\":\n    from sky_music.ui import picker as songs\n    if songs.HAS_PROMPT_TOOLKIT:\n        return songs.choose_song_interactively(\n            initial_profile=profile,\n            initial_tempo=tempo,\n            initial_dry_run=dry_run,\n        )\n\n    # Fallback CLI mode (no prompt_toolkit)\n    song_choices = get_song_choices(force_refresh=True)\n    print_choices_local(song_choices)\n\n    while True:\n        print(\"Commands: number/name = play, r = refresh, q = quit\")\n        selection = input(\"Select song: \").strip()\n\n        if selection.casefold() in {\"q\", \"quit\", \"exit\", \"0\"}:\n            return None\n        if selection.casefold() in {\"r\", \"refresh\"}:\n            clear_terminal()\n            song_choices = get_song_choices(force_refresh=True)\n            print_choices_local(song_choices)\n            continue\n\n        selected_song = resolve_song_selection(selection, song_choices)\n        if selected_song is not None:\n            return songs.SongPickerResult(\n                song_path=selected_song,\n                action=\"dry_run\" if dry_run else \"play\",\n                profile_name=profile,\n                tempo_scale=tempo,\n            )\n        print(\"\")\n\ndef print_choices_local(song_choices: list[Path]) -> None:\n    if not song_choices:\n        print(f\"No songs found in: {SONG_DIR.resolve()}\")\n        print(f\"Supported extensions: {', '.join(sorted(SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS))}\")\n        return\n    print(\"Songs:\")\n    for index, path in enumerate(song_choices, start=1):\n        print(f\"  {index:>2}) {path.stem}\")\n\ndef main() -> int:\n    if sys.platform == 'win32':\n        try:\n            sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')\n            sys.stderr.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n    parser = build_arg_parser()\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    # P4: Load user config and apply saved defaults (CLI flags override these)\n    user_cfg = load_config()\n    apply_config_defaults(args, user_cfg)\n\n    configure_from_args(args)\n    try:\n        controls = build_playback_controls(args)\n    except ValueError as exc:\n        parser.error(str(exc))\n\n    if args.inspect_telemetry is not None:\n        from sky_music.orchestration.telemetry import inspect_telemetry_report\n        inspect_telemetry_report(args.inspect_telemetry)\n        return 0\n\n    if args.doctor or args.doctor_timing or args.doctor_input:\n        import sky_music.infrastructure.doctor as doctor\n        if args.doctor:\n            doctor.run_all_doctor_checks()\n        elif args.doctor_timing:\n            print(\"=\" * 60)\n            print(\"         SKY MUSIC PLAYER — TIMING CHECK\")\n            print(\"=\" * 60)\n            diag = doctor.check_timer_resolution()\n            print(f\"Status: {'OK' if diag['ok'] else 'FAILED'}\\nDetails: {diag['msg']}\")\n            print(\"=\" * 60)\n        elif args.doctor_input:\n            print(\"=\" * 60)\n            print(\"         SKY MUSIC PLAYER — INPUT CHECK\")\n            print(\"=\" * 60)\n            kb_diag = doctor.check_keyboard_layout()\n            conflict_diag = doctor.check_physical_keys_held()\n            print(f\"Layout Mapping : {'OK' if kb_diag['ok'] else 'FAILED'} - {kb_diag['msg']}\")\n            print(f\"Key Conflicts  : {'OK' if conflict_diag['ok'] else 'WARNING'} - {conflict_diag['msg']}\")\n            print(\"=\" * 60)\n        return 0\n\n    song_choices = get_song_choices(force_refresh=True)\n\n    if args.list:\n        print_choices_local(song_choices)\n        return 0\n\n    if not song_choices and args.song is None:\n        print_choices_local(song_choices)\n        return 1\n\n    try:\n        enable_high_precision_timers()\n\n        if args.song is not None:\n            selected_song = resolve_song_selection(args.song, song_choices)\n            if selected_song is None:\n                return 2\n\n            repeat_count = max(args.repeat, 1)\n            for run_index in range(repeat_count):\n                if repeat_count > 1:\n                    print(f\"Run {run_index + 1}/{repeat_count}: {selected_song.stem}\")\n                if not args.no_clear:\n                    clear_terminal()\n                result = play_selected_song(selected_song, args.countdown, controls=controls)\n                if result == PLAYBACK_QUIT:\n                    return 0\n                if result == PLAYBACK_SKIPPED:\n                    return 0\n            return 0\n\n        while True:\n            picker_result = prompt_song_selection(\n                profile=TIMING_PROFILE_NAME,\n                tempo=TEMPO_SCALE,\n                dry_run=DRY_RUN_MODE,\n            )\n            if picker_result is None:\n                return 0\n\n            if not args.no_clear:\n                clear_terminal()\n\n            force_dry = (picker_result.action == \"dry_run\")\n            result = play_selected_song(\n                picker_result.song_path,\n                args.countdown,\n                controls=controls,\n                force_dry_run=force_dry,\n                force_profile=picker_result.profile_name,\n                force_tempo=picker_result.tempo_scale,\n            )\n            if result == PLAYBACK_QUIT:\n                return 0\n            if result == PLAYBACK_SKIPPED:\n                time.sleep(0.5)\n            else:\n                time.sleep(2)\n\n            if not args.no_clear:\n                clear_terminal()\n\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\n        print(\"\\nStopped by user.\")\n        return 130\n    finally:\n        disable_high_precision_timers()\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    raise SystemExit(main())\n"
  }
}
